I came for laser hair removal. Their laser works great, I see difference after 1 time (I did it in arm pits). My friend did Ultherapy for face lifting and it was painful (only during the treatment), but results are definitely worth it. Next day she was able to continue any activities, including beach and swimming. And now after 1 month we can see how jaw line is getting more sharp, wrinkles and lines around face are getting smaller. Doctor said it will take like 3 months for full results and we are really excited!\nService was nice and actual prices are cheaper than in our home (we are from Moscow). I saw also a client who did fillers under eyes (while we were waiting with numbing cream) - Doctor did very beautiful and careful work - no bruises, all clear like nothing had been done. [{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrhDhDlU3GI3fmzCVuFaIkZ4IKy9JZKNjc5ari7K5jjaVCXB4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

The cleaning was done perfectly, and the repair work was excellent. I’m writing this review two months later, and my teeth are still in perfect condition. Even though the material used to repair chipped teeth can sometimes be fragile, everything is holding up beautifully.

The dentist and staff were super nice, professional, and made me feel very comfortable throughout the visit. I’m very happy with the results and truly appreciate the care and skill of the team.

The clinic itself is clean, modern, and has a welcoming vibe with knowledgable professional staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbvDlB617Nw0p9Myvn4DfWyY8hNzraXBFQiYTR6jvAHw3a1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Beauty Bar Medical Clinics in LA, and I have to say, I am beyond impressed with both the service and the results. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by a welcoming and professional staff, which immediately set the tone for my visit.

The clinic itself is beautifully designed, clean, and modern, creating a relaxing yet upscale atmosphere. The team made sure I felt comfortable throughout the entire process, and the consultation was thorough, my concerns about my skin were listened to, and the expert suggestions they provided really made me feel confident about my treatment options.

I opted for a combination of Botox and a facial treatment, and I’m so happy with the results. The Botox was quick and virtually painless, and I loved that the practitioner explained every step of the process. For the facial, they used high-end, effective products that left my skin glowing and rejuvenated.

[{"Name":"Tanya Mazurenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_ZrBFhyhuE8P30mqRNw1flRvMJ1zfTKDzdKflbjswXDbSWGZk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Two months ago, I had two fillings done here. When I got home, the fillings felt very uncomfortable. At the end of the appointment, the dentist didn’t ask me if the fillings felt too high or check my bite, as is usually done. Had to make another appointment to fix this, and I also felt pressure between my teeth. But my complaints about this uncomfortable pressure were laughed at and the doctor did nothing, saying that everything was fine.

Now it’s been two months, and I still can’t chew properly with those teeth - every time I try, the gums around the fillings get inflamed. I’m not a dentist, but this really doesn’t seem “fine”.

I also feel that one of the fillings was done completely unnecessarily. Only after the appointment did I realize that three different dentists from other clinics had seen my x-rays and never mentioned anything about that second tooth. The cavity that needed treatment was on one tooth. Staff and doctor are very good. I would recommend this clinic and come back again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Y T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlLmaXVSWuZPgplXKY7EVfdp6KpxFC-yOVPb94TU7gc6oJYfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a terrible experience at this clinic and would not recommend it to anyone. I had three sessions of pico laser here, which cost 30K. Now, one and a half months after the treatments, there are still more than 10 pea-sized hard bumps on my face, caused by the injections they gave immediately after pico laser. My skin condition is now much worse than before, and this has caused me severe stress.

First, they never explained what was in the injection before the treatment and clearly weren’t aware of the damage it would cause. When I asked, the nurses only vaguely described it as a “vitamin cocktail,” and the injection was done while my eyes were covered. The bumps developed exactly where those injections were given.

Yet this was not even the worst part. What’s truly alarming is how the doctor handled the situation afterwards. When I first pointed out the bumps (fibrosis) and asked for a solution, she only offered mild laser treatments, which did not help even after repeated visits. When I suggested steroid injections, she rejected the idea and insisted the bumps would gradually subside on their own.

One month later, the bumps were still there and had grown even bigger. Only then did she finally agree to inject steroids — but only in the spots she personally thought looked “obvious.” She refused to treat the other areas that clearly had the same issue, insisting they would “disappear” on their own. Even after seeing that the steroid worked, she still refused to treat all the bumps, leaving several areas swollen.

The doctor’s injections caused severe inflammation, yet she refused to provide proper treatment, relied blindly on laser for issues clearly beyond its scope, and missed the best window for recovery. Her arrogance and ignorance outweighed any genuine care for her clients. After all the stress they caused with their own errors, they didn’t bother to apologize and even stopped responding to client messages, which is why I’m sharing my experience here.

Pico laser requires a lot of aftercare. I avoided outdoor activities for months, wore sunscreen and a mask every time I went out, and took every precaution to protect my skin. And still, this is the result I was left with. Be careful before you invest your time and money into skin treatments here, when the service provider is unprofessional, all of your efforts can be completely wasted by their malpractice and mistakes.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3ifzQYOdsKVosaFRdCZ69ZDwLkdM4bHwhJNX-BPmEkOQ94WcevjF5pf_nEkaFY5MJmRyDhW-ViZbnTXTkHMNAXbijoaUxzJ6C2pk52LxHmtISLYotPZWML8fvYnXoXLKlnkPYkoufbuvw=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"Shanu Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvSVgdoLlOKSxNWlaalahG4fvA2BIjaM0GMJuQDmYFIrYZnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Laser Premium Clinic in Phuket and had an incredible experience. I opted for both the CO2 laser and Pico laser treatments, and the results have truly exceeded my expectations.

From the moment I entered the clinic, I was impressed by the elegant and calming atmosphere. The staff were professional, friendly, and very attentive to my needs. They took the time to explain the procedures thoroughly, answered all my questions patiently, and made me feel completely at ease.

The treatments themselves were done with utmost care and precision. The equipment was modern and hygienic, and I could feel that I was in expert hands. After just one session, I noticed remarkable improvement in my skin — smoother texture, reduced pigmentation, and a radiant glow that I couldn’t stop admiring.

What stood out most was the staff’s dedication to ensuring my comfort during and after the treatment. They followed up with aftercare instructions and even checked in on my progress, which I deeply appreciated.

If you are looking for high-quality laser treatments with visible, lasting results, I highly recommend Laser Premium Clinic in Phuket. Their expertise, hospitality, and results make them truly deserving of the name "Premium."

I’m beyond satisfied with my experience and will definitely return for future treatments. Don’t hesitate — your skin deserves this level of care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zola Alessandra Marracino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUd2dLknDzdlpfdLAqWmtzwTZQR2McqxpiOJIC3k7bK6iFkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience having co2 laser here. Pictures 1 week after resolving the misplaced fillers in a different branch in Patong. the bump next to the lips are not gone but it is way better than before - see picture. The Botox between eyebrows and forehead I got instead in Patong was good. One eyebrow I can move and the other one not at all. But it might change. The lifting effect of the eye brows I don't see much but they told me honestly from the beginning so it's completely fine. I wanted to try it once. Very cute staff, not pushy or in a rush, very caring, got nice skin treatment, explained everything and listened to what you really want and they were the only ones recognizing that the previous fillers look very odd and wrong. I appreciated that a lot! Downside from this experience is that I lost quite some money, time and nerves as my treatment is not equal to what I paid as explained below. Mistakes can happen, that's okay. It could have been very easy and quick for the management and first doctor to recognize, acknowledge, change and fix the situation immediately but it became difficult and long with unnecessary comments.

Update 07.04.25:
After some back and forth I had to drive to Patong branch to resolve a previously misplaced filler, as I preferred a different doctor. But the management made clear that I will not get a treatment worth 100% what I paid ( 17.000 thb) but Botox worth less than that (lower would be 11k/10k). according to them they deduct my money because a customer saw my experience and canceled their appointment because of me. Not sure what to say to this.

Original post:
Most horrible result. I went to this beauty studio and asked specifically for thread lift and maybe fillers under the eyes or Botox so that my face will look more slim, fresh and uplifted. Later at my appointment the doctor said he won't do thread lifting and recommended like the deep wrinkles on the cheek, the smile lines. I was very hesitant because I really don't like this style of fillers where the face looks big round or fat at the cheeks and communicated it. He assured it won't be like that because of his technique. I paid 17.000 thb (450eur). Now I look like a fat sad hamster like already predicted. The face is more saggy downwards now,  very bumpy, second wrinkle appeared, worse than before. Also the front desk staff can be a bit pushy sales wise. I got a call out of the blue on the weekend to make an appointment. In the clinic they made offer after offer until I had to ask them to stop suggesting more treatments. I went there twice after the treatment because I saw directly this will go in the wrong direction. The doctor said I need to wait over a month because it is only swollen and maybe he would need to put more filler there. Over the years, I’ve brought my partner, friends, and even my mother and mother-in-law here for treatments — and if that doesn’t say trust, I don’t know what does. [{"Name":"Krzysztof","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMticu7h1Lq9A78eLZsoEvuwfTVhLJhxUli0v6TbHcMCrfqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can you imagine one of the worst thing that can happen on your holiday ? Problem with your tooth... it can ruin your plans. It was my first time when I had to use the medical service in foreign country. I used internet to find some dentists around my current location. I found Phuket Smile Signature website, I fulfilled form and after few hours I received e-mail notification that my appointment has been scheduled according with my requirements (one day after). When I came to the dentist location I was served with the highest care. The service was very friendly and helpful (to give me some advices which places is worth to visit in Phuket ;) ). The doctor was very professional and nice. The whole procedure (x-ray + filling) took about 1hr. The price was also very low (in comparison to service in Poland). I was also pleasantly  surprised that the overall standard of location and dental equipment was very high. I really recommend this place :) - it saved my holiday.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"noel henry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5JZXhL-TLtVJE07b_eOjlSx49YRVa98rUKM0A8LjEmPhblCc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doctor was very professional, very caring making sure there was no pain at any stage. Staff were very good, polite and helpful all the time. Great location and professional premises and equipment.
I would highly recommend coming to Patong Smile Signature Dental Clinic, as professional as I have found anywhere in the world without it costing an arm and a leg.
I am not one to normally give praise for any service but this service was exceptional.
I also liked the background music playing which helped to relax somewhat.
Again highly recommend place and especially Dr Panlop Chuysakul for being an exceptional professional.

[{"Name":"Jenny Shelton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-3g-ddS7DyWWlYpC8y6J-VEe0KVuDIe4FJ3OmNSPfWnZpJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been attending Dental Joy phuket for many years.  The service and friendliness of Dr Joy and all of her staff is amazing.
My husband and I have both had implants, veneers, crowns, basically most dental procedures.  We are so happy we return every year for check-ups and any further dental work if required.
So many people in Australia ask where we had our teeth done as they look so natural. We have recommended so many friends who have come to Dr Joy and all of them are extremely happy and will continue to come back.
We recently came to Thailand with friends as one of them required a full mouth restoration.  The dental work is now completed and looks fantastic.
The cost is also so much cheaper than Australia.
We get the whole package, a holiday in a great place, any dental work required in a super clean surgery and super friendly staff who will help you with anything they can
I cannot rate or recommend Dr Jou, Dentaljoy Phuket highly enough.
We had most contact with Dr Joy amd her Receptionist Michelle, again I cannot speak more highly of them.
Finally, if your teeth are in need of anything, make the trip to see Dr Joy, you won't be sorry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie Megalli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQVK5D1Fz2Qo1p4v2D3-WK5xPNqx4eUdLK85cXKTSYHunMfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Joy, Michelle and the team at Dentaljoy Phuket clinic were absolutely fantastic.
I had 4 fillings and 4 composite veneers on my front teeth, and I couldn’t be happier with the results.

From the first consultation, everything was explained clearly and professionally, which made me feel completely at ease. Dr Joy is incredibly skilled, gentle, and attentive to detail the veneers look natural, balanced, and exactly what I was hoping for.

The clinic itself is modern, spotless, and very well run, and the whole team is warm, caring, and organised. The experience was smooth from start to finish, and the standard of care exceeded my expectations.

I highly recommend Dentaljoy Phuket to anyone considering dental work — especially cosmetic dentistry. I would 100% return again","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2248A7T6nFT2hlRmrT0aMi0h2XpJSs5uPttnJQBwx0zT77OMFJmOEQRV_VzXv8EERWLLo2PB5VQAMsSd36RB1Z-hT-91ohz8VMsUgeFUYhLL-4CgMqrIR-1ZnuV8Cnvya3w4A1v2DZEpux=k-no"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Jayde Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYpkpkpVCwGhfiLXhoFi_TO7kxmGFAXwv-V_AhraGi7vR-ow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Every staff member I interacted with during each visit was nothing short of amazing. From the moment I arrived, everyone was welcoming, friendly, caring, and incredibly patient.

I was very nervous about having dental work done, but the team made me feel completely at ease. I was given medication to help me stay calm, which made a huge difference (I highly recommend Lorazepam if you’re anxious — it helped immensely).

I am extremely grateful for my entire experience, from the initial contact right through to the completion of my treatment. I couldn’t recommend this dental practice highly enough.

Thank you to each and every one of you for your kindness, care, and for making my experience so positive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Lockwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTmVSfVKmOLEQ9wotQR_Gw-U-xXPEeofTRHVfJZLorQSyArAclEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am very happy with Dr. Joy and her amazing team. I’ve always had dental anxiety and needed quite a bit of work done—three root canals, three crowns, and teeth whitening. In Australia, this would’ve cost over $20,000. Instead, I made two trips to Phuket and had everything done for around $7,000, including (admittedly discounted) flights, accommodation, and even some spending money!

Despite a few scary moments, Dr. Joy made me feel completely at ease—She’s gentle, professional, and genuinely cares about her patients. I also had teeth whitening done by her lovely assistant and I’m absolutely thrilled with the results. I’ve had so many compliments from friends and family on my smile!

I will say that one tooth couldn’t be saved—her Endodontist started a root canal but discovered a vertical split that wasn’t visible on X-rays. What truly impressed me was that the root canal was completed but I wasn’t charged for that appointment. It was such a kind and thoughtful gesture, and it really showed the integrity of Dr. Joy and her team.

A special thank you to Michelle at reception—she’s fantastic! She made organising and rescheduling appointments so easy, and even helped work around my sightseeing plans.

If you’re an Aussie thinking about getting dental work done in Phuket, I highly recommend Dr. Joy and her team.

ขอบคุณมาก :)","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1zFkePfjBav22L2ojOHqPPl3HY0fp7f8lIEmdzUcDQJxnLx_oQeTISmPpmbk8BJ5fomJ_nieQ9e39ExzeV4wzFsGzStvYrd5O3Lp4MZ7mI9j4WVW5HANwZsh4rvfF5aEQaFbEl=k-no"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Ricky Bagnall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRJRwH1WD5rSP9dCLn1CDTiSkOLjD_FmoXz7KedmqKLHMm9XY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best in the business, amazing and easy from consult to treatment. I personally am so thankful that I went to Dental Joy. I had two composite veneers built up on my two teeth either side of my front two teeth. The workmanship was exceptional and I am so happy with my new smile. I was advised to not whiten my teeth prior to getting the veneers otherwise the veneers may be more noticeable. Instead the proffesional advice I received from the practitioner was to have the colour match my natural tooth colour which enhanced the final finish. I had heard another client decided to go against this advice and then complained afterwards as it was a noticeable shade difference. I would recomed you listen to this proffesional as the attention to detail and the care taken makes you feel that you are in very safe hands.
Very happy customer from Australia, highly recommend Dental Joy😀","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1WvCUlGmKDwWkUoDhSLm6IZ6a4wpczls5PVx7fkpHk9CLqDkiFy57b371cYNyt6qVcl6JLW3To3U9t3D-IU2bco81_Pv3bPfRl0uv3JRuhctM8T-qH2x3CvdkykU93pe4q_Ixp=k-no"],"When":"2024-12-3"},{"Name":"Linda Sarandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVzQdvCLLhFYbz7Y30FenGJCo4u3Budv01Y7J3gO3_c16ym-U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything from the communication by reception to the dentist and dental staff was absolutely outstanding. I went in to have a broken crown replaced on one of my front teeth. The color match is perfect and the care taken was world class. Clean, modern dentistry right in the heart of Patong. I highly recommend Dental Joy for all of your dental needs... give them a call, you'll be glad you did","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Josh Moyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-NH4m6W6ERhVXzWlA0kOREt-7aUiRpsRN_pe9VlB5BRwk8LrZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Joy Dental Phuket – 5 Stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Even before arriving in Phuket, the communication with Joy Dental was clear and direct. I already had a good idea of what to expect thanks to their WhatsApp support, which was warm, kind, and consistent from the very beginning.

I’ll admit, I was a little nervous. My friend Dale had recommended the clinic, but he only shared one photo and not much detail. Still, his words stuck with me: “They’re very professional and the service is excellent.” I don’t use the word excellent lightly, but in this case, I completely agree.

From day one, Michelle helped calm my nerves with both her kindness and her practical support — even providing the right medication to ease me into the process before I sat in the chair. Dr. Joy (her nickname) is personable, relatable, and truly cares about her clients and her craft. I never once felt worried that something was going wrong.

The whole process felt safe, supportive, and professional. I was well cared for, listened to, given breaks when needed, and every concern was addressed with patience. There was open dialogue about results, which made me feel confident at every stage.

Today, I have a fantastic, natural-looking smile with a full mouth resolution — and it feels life-changing.

A huge thank you to Dr. Joy, Michelle, and the entire team — even the dental assistants, who were all so caring and kind. I wholeheartedly recommend Joy Dental Phuket from the bottom of my heart.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0WCDL2I7dSmMzSHHBTixoJ1NDzNvpLS8Oxys-QbmfzbemLkuHek7NcbtQoDbr-laDFCshvL0s3rD3gmcIfpQ8O5PdoHBiuH0fVsB30IAsQ-xh_ktWTcqm_lR8GI2IYq5ocvZUeQar5uaYP=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1gpFJ9hakt5AafNXTDvzWqOzStyiqFQ0nZPqTOHkPNi_KvhgnkFbP4NsV4hZPeTNwAjz477ZMhC4Oq7ZyooMqZuc4qIzNS2p3lRB9tzXh-LNnO0cCEhYtv6NJb4NScvZA_PqrjAVi3ls74=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Karyn Haase","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYb4GT2hp1KW5QWxJPDqt6mTNU4ah-fOSkLXiWofa5x99PbXc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I have visited Dental Joy for minor dental procedures (cleans, X-rays and fillings) a few times over the years and have always had a great experience. The team is friendly, the clinic is clean and the prices are fair. We will always return when visiting Phuket.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Thank you guys so much🙏🙏🙏","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1LXu4bIYnwPRLeKRj7AqEupbLF0dloSHrQBxltYeN4BhvEMbvlVBlXbYLrKXNSYozLZsJYfnhfhWqnIl19_tBoAhR3YTGx3q1DrUg3PJoL3_f-Z9ADleQUr6ljb4-eufnB0vbs=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn03Ts_WsRx85FihrsKhgRwvZHQftFrxY8DN9JiUd4nWb1HuLBAFqxhJ16yfV8MxX94vnK5ZJiPN1f2y6sC7AXK4ilM2q_Qr_pUvxANFRehvhTSPEVHC9vtLkwIe0qf8k6HTFhvlsA=k-no"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Nazifa Abasova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9jeLNL7if4ZHhfkU0fwYzYqMEpSc9A6a0hZzoyt1OkTk5pg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Don’t fall into the positive reviews here, 90% written by employees!

I found this place on Google when my sister was visiting me in Phuket for the limited time. She was looking to get face rejuvenation and lip filler procedures.

They accepted her on weekend. After a quick consultation they said that the doctor has time at the moment. My sister got Radiesse and Juvederm lip filler.
Prices were pretty high ( 30000 Tbh for Radiesse and 16000 for Juvederm) and when I asked the sales lady convinced me that they have the best doctor here with 30 years experience, that’s why their prices are higher than others. And I convinced because we were looking for someone experienced.
Usually when you take this kind of injections, doctor gives you the information about the solution/medication, explain you the expected results, complications, risks and having you to read and  sign the written  consent form. None of this happened in this place. Doctor and the staff knew that my sister will have a flight after 3 days back to her home country.
As soon as my sister arrived home she called me crying that all the Radiesse is gathered in one side of her face, she can even feel the liquid  is moving under her skin when she walks. For the record Radiesse is not a filler, it supposed to improve the collagen production. I immediately contacted to the clinic and they said it’s a swallow and if she do some massage it will go away. 1 week passed, my sister did massage every day and it didn’t go away. I messaged  to the clinic again in the morning. They got back to me after 7 hours that doctor is not in the clinic now and she will get back after 2 days.
It’s been about 3 weeks now that my sister got those injections, that liquid which is gathered on one line on her face ( right side) doesn’t go away. She went to see the cosmetologist in US, they are asking about the serial numbers of the Juvederm and the Radiesse, but Blue Icon “clinic” is not able to give me that information, and they never given anything. I went to the clinic, there were only the receptionist, and said she can’t do anything.

Now I don’t know what to do and my only option is to make a claim with the tourist police.

Note: I can see now the pictures on the reviews, they all are employees there. Please be careful. They won’t give you any guarantee.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2-4Pfu2PMvEThjwhpNFPdLT9T4PMBEx9MedsUEZXwI6wH1egZHE5l7ZvEwsIetMAtXUY2S1BPLCxjgbdQQkhJbkRK4tqZ09fe0q-xNiHL08XZa--K3Ix7gRLjVNdNMhQJpbKv7Bw=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1AUiszEMXer6j9S3FB-Ao1gwiATDHAGkQe05F0rKeLnSuDYgA4_PJuIUjAlOkEdg9dzo3N475EdRx8udhQSfOYxjR3KmzjwERGU1ecElaHcz8xEAeS2OoxuvIgETsV18oYwdbd=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3V2wPRSApg_IvbMSMZlFi6ssztz5lWT1soMjlUypFd2EclUy2HPommdSGb28ul3rZOgYafo7su4s3kvEB60YlNr_XfLAJqpF40NZp7rkAJFd0s6OTroQUaZKVFmXaoX9TpFaxiwg=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1QRCWi7SqbK7WFUZ6dSw2u6aTs_t0hkzLwyxpDVN21uP3g5KPiZkTyhpJDGsu7sWxlGHuohc3kwfpGOGlgfONIJZI_GyH3IjtS5zt95tsE5TOHzTjt__wkRTj1XF9C6_akJO9m=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0biqqTqZ5J2mnzrkWY9uWQa_LFXwa3qNYN33SFdqY28ZnqfPzeARbslVJ6qN_wsOXL7_SYlhgW3Efyk5rp18yEP3BQyxJqtQPTsTUydY60jxNI7fO20G9F-ArjY4uXioUycoKZmA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0y9cxmmVbdYhtm7Z-WBykDjhuFP52Z6m7hZFNzcErZKQ4ppE8-Iu_i-wSKrycI6SWGPfFnuvBRrfZ1UWRVJTYxPh_0bxxTtMGzezLWtwvkwQCVon_yNIwiSfIlAlAgvxWgdpGK=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2OpYliAXODukvnlybhQiSdsW21IPbtF0TA2KeNo8cOCaowaFqo8UFVvdz8l4gx5Y0UkbtyrITDIWJN8ZKm5tlJbOJzU-Xr0vZU2AAy1l_6vXAAVXd2Mtlyngs8tiVIR0O1hV0_9A=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3Ga13zwycwTFqWCM8Pk3ox22CtpsTKRXf8SSuykJwFHq9i1lWUDAHn3VViFkD4-hx6tR5vcBm-OJ9ZwnQrNBUls7lGgE9hrXYvWg1bwrFjcvOgwxbleeojTWXz7nvWfRbohrs=k-no"],"When":"2024-8-22"},{"Name":"Brian Covington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHggwlNEV1B4UaguRhI2aRsBQexuSH9wr6LEDi-OSVfd8IblgWVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love going to this clinic. He fondled me and took all the necessary photos and then told me that I needed liposuction on my sides and that I would not look good as a B cup.  Before I could even see him I had to do physical therapy which did nothing of course and was not easy to get to as a single mom.  I desperately wanted this surgery as I had endured back pain for a few years.  He never even turned in the paperwork to my insurance company.  For two years afterwards I tried to get a second opinion, I was referred to at least 5 other surgeons in the area who would not even see me based on his notes.  Finally when my insurance changed a different set up hospitals were available and my referral was again sent out.  I had a consultation and explained what had happened and he said unfortunately it sounded like he wanted me to pay out of pocket, which was never going to be an option for me.  He had heard my story before he said.  He also said that he didn't see any reason why my insurance would not cover the procedure and that I definitely did not need liposuction.  He turned in my paperwork and I got approved and booked for surgery two months later.  I should have never had to have gone through waiting two and a half years to get this procedure done.  I went from a 32 I to a 30 C with just a breast reduction and lift and couldn't be happier and more comfortable and able to run and exercise and be pain free. It was a life changing surgery that Dr Niazi just didn't want to do through my insurance and ruined it for me for over 2 years.  No one should have to go through this. [{"Name":"Luke Tharasri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVL9aj_crvcm_mEMZIvxJ_rlQEK1TXERQj87DQTjQF45og52Ns=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located on the 4th floor of Siam Paragon, KKC Clinic was a great experience that I’ll definitely return for. The booking experience was easy and seamless, with P. Champagne responding quickly on WhatsApp and accommodating a same-day appointment. I chose the Platinum-level Hydrafacial treatment which was about 10k THB. When we arrived, P. Champagne was very helpful and attentive, walking us through the process and getting us started quickly after a bit of paperwork. Once you fill out the paperwork the first time, check-in will be much faster on subsequent visits.

The treatment was about 60 minutes and included 7 procedures: deep cleansing, aqua peeling, blackhead extraction, vitamin infusion with ultrasound, radio frequency, hydro mask, and glass skin. The nurse was great at explaining each one as she performed them. She even shows you everything that was removed from your face at the end! The results far exceeded my expectations with my face looking and feeling clean and refreshed for several days after.

Highly recommended and will return every few months as part of my self-care routine!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3rmA91nVyhFGsq3e5BJro9VJlAtMJWe1wods6dJekAB8yupjOIT0LMb_R2ipZ8IrUmasJd2B5vqW18aDr7t0_U6Q7cR-4iED7Bu0RRcFG7fu9t0qUDyJVUdIbzLgtriLH59uTqTUlPLig=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2TBiPkYs_NWYPJfsznIR0bwsBXlbuVXyCLbUcED6DWlgHfDGR0AKIFYQfWqOnzPmlmfmg1LWsvNDtIZhO73eKrKgVqpJFKqauMBKmFd978h46rUO-jvQ4c6M-EC-snGBT_SCAdV3Ef39Cs=k-no"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"özlem aytekin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKooxiY_7xhYePgVN3-3qgAYvkQ0acBpaMdaXBVH5Ja7Ec5LA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am truly very satisfied with my experience at KKC Clinic. I highly recommend this clinic and I look forward to visiting again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pammi Panisara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqKsR-8cDHWlmARwpLqOcOLDdNSGPKuREVF68xjQ9RzakjDFE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was searching for a clinic that can give me the treatment that i wanted for example Liposuction, because i was really scared about it but at the end i found this clinic and they help me a lot.
P'Chomphu was my consultant we was very helpful with explaining the detail and help me with any needs and acompany everywhere and also gave me the best doctors.
I did Liposuction, Sylfirm and Rejuwhite. I was very happy with every service.
Thank you very much P'Chomphu 🥹❤🫶","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn38y-A_jzsZeFofhSJYJlDb1BKZrZSd9I8-xI8mYnHaB9KZVnBgRCICEcFbpiLHZ9Tf-924Cm-BwwWw9eAZ0sChUAfMLxXYj8YUqReoSLpSbhZImkjffYSWCpHlEBakgmpZSNGIoHVE43jx=k-no"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Cheers Chew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQXEcTiZaOF-PUO-GUp7ZBhxtYcfLWRmXVKFaxl0CYUZfZgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was on vacation in Thailand, with a stop in Bangkok and randomly decided to look into beauty services that I would normally get back home in the U.S. This included Botox, but I was also curious about some jawline filler and a mesotherapy injection to help dissolve my "barely there" double chin. For context, I am a black American female, mid 40s, with very few wrinkles and do Botox occasionally for maintenance. I will say that overall, "Dr. A" (not her actual name, but what she told me to call her) and her assistant "Nungning" did an AMAZING job! The clinic is lovely, very clean/sanitary and in a great location. I did an initial consult upon arrival with Dr. A, Nungning and one other nurse/assistant (who I think was present to help with English-to-Thai translation), where we discussed my objectives and also final pricing. I ultimately decided to go with a little Botox, the mesotherapy injection under my chin and 2 boxes of Radiesse (filler) in my jawline. While they did try to sell me on under eye filler, I wasn't comfortable getting that without having done my research, especially in another country. Once I decided on my injections, signed all the forms and made payment, they took me to the back for the procedure and a series of before & after photos. I think the whole process took about an hour and a half. They gave me aftercare instructions, as well as a precautionary round of antibiotic pills to take with me, just in case. Nungning also personally checked in with me via text several days later, just to make sure everything was okay. Loved that! While I did have some swelling in my jawline for a few days (which is to be expected when getting filler), I would use a cold compress whenever I could to help keep the swelling down. Fast forward now three weeks later and finally back home in the U.S., I am happy to say that the swelling subsided and my jawline looks beautiful... and SNATCHED! Dr. A gave me really did give me exactly what I wanted!!! The Botox that I got in my forehead has also finally set in and I love it. I don't really notice much difference from the mesotheraphy injection though under my chin... but I'm now thinking the "double chin" was really all in my head in the first place. Overall, VERY happy with my results from KKC Clinic, Dr. A and Nungning!!! I do have to be honest and say the only negative thing about this experience was the pricing. I decided to get these injections done in Bangkok specifically because I was expecting it to be cheaper than if I did it in the U.S... but it was NOT. I paid over $2500 for jawline filler, a few units of botox in my forehead and a mesotherapy injection under my chin. If I had to do it over again, I would have just waited until I got home. Getting any type of invasive treatments done abroad is RISKY, especially when there is a language barrier. Thankfully KKC Clinic did care enough to send me off with antibiotics as a precaution... but imagine if a serious infection happened while in a foreign country, needing real medical treatment and having a language barrier?!?! For that reason, I probably wouldn't do it again and would not advise foreigners visiting Thailand to get these types of procedures done, especially since it's not even a significant price difference. However, I am still very grateful to KKC Clinic for their professionalism, amazing service and taking great care of me in my decision to visit them while in Bangkok. Thank you KKC Clinic!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3TTnvy8vFVwn8oNzSQ26qFSHQLQix6JqxDyc-abCHjBsGwkQQeyTJAN6iIUfPFDjEGHMjvfZuKVKov3ThytJ3vtqGScMMZJE_fLHRIP_0HxNwjTnUjMX9anH2LtS5avh8fp2taFenY0QF8=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn19djEXGfa04zVrsel8D5velhfe4J4PRkUypyi59_EcN7ChNtdH08wCj2WiypJjxcxuyqB0pyLzLxzRrJPOCXguZ8Cz4doEANPJL_kHnBn-eTuutIWGz8ymyKWHx3hVC-WAFSKEsc8B-YE=k-no"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"denise lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFX9IVLGJJyC4ZHyfF3mVO8xOeI2G0BSUOhXUmH00jQ3qrhw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pop was not pushy with recommending the treatments ~
Nid was the one that helped with my acne facial. First time experiencing and they were very nice in explaining that it may be pain. When she said that I had slight discomfort she stopped and comforted hahah. Thank you.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn34qlB6NYRgeBaI57nu1x2uqB3zfKpn4DmqGcbqGPj6Nplj_-trhgXhWb52SPLrdr786s5oxP0ngFVAGmuKAMLBgUqFb13Q4Dk2UhryWDxdC5wtul8uNCifC93ZK8JHYfi6ZUriVLGCRF1s=k-no"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Maureen Balmeo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMHF3ei_GnFNbvQsEpU-Jul_tVU3VBG_K3btra_dy1IlL8TQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at KKC Clinic! From the moment I reached out to ask about treatments, the staff were friendly, helpful, and quick to respond to all my questions.

Since this was my first cosmetic procedure in a foreign country, I was very nervous—but Dr. Tle made me feel completely comfortable. She explained everything in detail and made sure I understood what was happening during the entire procedure.

Kwang, one of their consultants, also checked in on me multiple times—even a week later—to make sure I was doing well and that all my concerns were answered. I felt really supported and cared for. I would definitely come back to KKC!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miss Hliang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9IfBq2zvflsghc4ikSgkicDZYXy0dqHZxBMJ7-cWy8JM1wFN0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A caution to anyone who wants to try this clinic.

We booked some treatments for our last day in Bangkok. We were re-assured our treatments would finish within 2hrs commencing at 11am-1pm which we were static about as we wanted to do some last minute shopping and eating.

11am- we arrive but dont start the treatment until 11:24 due to the clinics “strict policy” regarding payment before treatment. We didnt have time to exchange in the money as most places did not open until 10:30am. We didnt think it would be so difficult to pay after the treatment, a standard method in many many salons and clinics.

During facials, we were switched around to different rooms so many times which is just so unprofessional and weird.

1hr passed and we still had not started my second treatment (micro-needling). What was stated as 30mins of numbing cream changed to 1hr recommendation🤦🏾‍♀️🤦🏾‍♀️ at this point it was past 2pm and we had to check in to the airport by 3pm leaving no time for the micro-needling.

We left the clinic around 2:30pm as we did not have enough time left. I messaged our sales rep on whatsapp only to be given excuses and blamed regarding the payment delay and booking “last minute”. We were told 2hrs for treatment which is what we accepted. We left your salon with unfinished treatment after nearly 3.5hrs! Hello? Do you see the problem?
They also took 50% deposit upon booking, whats the issue in paying the remainder on completion? We also lost nearly $200AUD in exchange fees and lost our last minute shopping time. They did not even apologise lol😐

We made it to the airport in the nick of time! There are plenty of other clinics in Thailand, just avoid this one. Expensive and waste of time. Ps. I ended up doing the micro needling in Melbourne for $718AUD for *3 sessions*. This clinic was charging around $650-700 for the same thing for one session. Do your research please and avoid at all cost if you value your time, peace and money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abdul Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwb8VGT9eLZGtmoS63-ZxC6o7lLZUmXpDMUNGWXiKzxLdVYVFo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience at KKC Clinic in Bangkok. From the moment we arrived, the process was professional and well organized.
The customer service representative took time to understand our health history and previous treatments before recommending suitable options. Nothing felt rushed or pushed. The consultation was clear, honest, and informative.
Each of us was then escorted to a private treatment room where the nurse and therapist (thank you, Wan) handled everything with great care and professionalism. Finally, Dr. Cin performed the procedure with impressive precision and skill. The results were truly amazing.
What makes this clinic special is the structured approach, attention to safety, and clear communication at every step. Both my mother and I were very satisfied with the outcome.
I will definitely visit again without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The whole team is very patient and reassuring during cleaning and massage pre treatment. Renaud carefully answers any questions you have and never did he "push" on any treatment/products, and Dr. Peeraya executed the HIFU procedure in a truly textbook manner with precision and power, leaving nothing to chance

This is a luxury clinic who knows what they are doing and not a Botox factory Injecting bottles of toxin when you don't need them. Yes it's more expensive than those budget clinics who sell by the bottle but this clinic is more precise and customized. Everyone spoke perfect English so I honestly felt like I was back in Canada. [{"Name":"Samantha Sinclair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV81jXwEzRbayPcOBOQuHzslpNj2Ro2zJ8vD3qI6DtlQe9KUgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been dealing with rosacea for a while, and it was super annoying having redness and visible veins all the time. Dr. Pat was really friendly and explained everything so I felt comfortable. The treatment didn’t hurt—just a little warm—and my face was a bit red afterward but it went away fast.

After about a week, the redness calmed down a lot, and my skin looked way better after a few weeks. The staff checked up on me too, which was nice.

Definitely happy with how it turned out and would recommend Dr.PAT if you have rosacea.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn19MXVtDQtoAAgybuN3DvW-8Rk9GxKt2wOQ2qannkCU0lCdy4M3iU0EEAnKJ9qJN_F6QSdNi5jaUCQWQDDcvoTKSbfUrnnyoqnW7FHYrojZyp90d3722-fFvqHC8a-CNL7XZWD-ADn3ag=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Valeria Garcia Orellana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIA90fsWNlUjVtDq8TeJfEqVAyn0CLDxH8t8McAAOCOh9FEDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"After 4 weeks of getting Botox at this clinic, my wrinkles look exactly the same—there was no difference at all. I even attached a photo at the 4-week mark showing the lack of results.

When I raised my concern, the response I received was that I would need to pay for another appointment. I paid  for Botox, and not even a single follow-up visit was included. In every other country where I’ve had Botox (this was my 4th time), the doctor always includes a follow-up appointment around 2–3 weeks later to check the results and adjust if necessary. That is standard practice.

Here, Dr. Patt administered the Botox, and when I told him I still had wrinkles, his only answer was to “wait 3 months.” No adjustment, no concern, no follow-up—unless I paid more.

Unfortunately, my impression is that Dr. Patt is only interested in money, not in the wellbeing or satisfaction of his patients. This is not how medical care should be.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn34gFUTfoRocYXGwgYpnN6vwt1kN35tp2oeDA8FYZ25s8Mj5_b7kXQ2M_9GFDbOIZl1yH-sfCVOFq_jIXawDpzdQvBVYcyNwgi82Z5PJTMSKTzWrkM0CxiBLApAiFspLwI9sR9K352WT_zg=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Hanna Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_Xg1bwnOt9XvfvAdfhCkY_uJ-PT3wpUiDQwFosn7lpkQ1T1fTKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Pat and his clinic are fantastic. I had spreading perioral dermatitis on my face, with one quickly scheduled appointment - Dr. Pat diagnosed this and provided a treatment plan that was manageable and healed the skin problem in less than 2 weeks. Additionally, I had my first full body skin cancer screening with Dr. Pat and won’t go anywhere else. I felt confident in his ability and respected as a patient. I received a follow up around 2 months later checking in on my skin issue and was happy to share that it had cleared completely!

I had to wait some time to see the doctor but it's understandable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Toni urck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGshmRRBeoPQxx8rfCuspAhFkMp6eX7ZGaYqHkmg1s7ZXd-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at this clinic for my acne treatment. The staff were very kind, professional, and attentive throughout the process. The doctor explained everything clearly and recommended a treatment plan that suited my skin condition.

After just a few sessions, I already noticed a big improvement — my skin feels smoother, less inflamed, and the breakouts have reduced significantly. The clinic is clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, which made me feel confident and relaxed during each visit.

I’m really happy with the results so far and will definitely continue my treatment here. Highly recommended for anyone who struggles with acne and wants real improvement with proper care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Александра Комароми","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSXQCwizTfs50L5k59Jyb4UzrfiUu3WswcoPaJSrH73J7elg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend this cosmetologist.
He helped me completely heal my skin from acne, and the results have been amazing. He never pushes unnecessary treatments and always focuses on what truly works. I fully trust him and feel confident in every recommendation. A true professional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yeya García - SoyEsaMamá","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_RSjebzzwHH-vYtvYrwHGHMx93Rhwzeh9no7OMUCbewvFxw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have visited this dermatologist several times, and unfortunately my experience has been disappointing.

The first time, I went for pigmentation and mild acne. I was prescribed antibiotics and advised to undergo laser treatment (which was offered at a very high cost). I trusted the recommendation and followed the treatment plan, but I saw no improvement whatsoever. When I returned and explained that there was no progress, I was told there were no other treatment options—only the same laser procedure, which I had already tried without results.

I also felt pressured into cosmetic procedures. At one point I was told: “You are pretty but you can be prettier”, and fillers and Botox were suggested. Eventually, I agreed to Botox, which was again very expensive. Unlike my experiences in other countries, no follow-up appointment was included two weeks later to check results or make adjustments. When I requested one, I was told I would need to pay for another consultation, even though the Botox was clearly ineffective (the wrinkles remained).

To make matters worse, two days after the injections I developed a facial allergic reaction. I asked for an urgent appointment and not only was I charged for it, but I was also prescribed antibiotics yet again.

As a healthcare professional myself, I fully value and respect the work of doctors and believe medical services should never be “free.” However, when treatments don’t work—or worse, when they trigger an adverse reaction—the minimum expectation is proper follow-up and patient care. In this clinic, that was never the case. The focus seemed to be entirely on charging for additional procedures, regardless of whether they benefited my health.

One comment in particular made me very uncomfortable: I was told that because of the watch I was wearing, it meant I had “a lot of money and could spend a lot here.” This reinforced my impression that the priority was not patient wellbeing, but profit.

It is disappointing to have to write this review, but I feel it is important to share. In my experience, this clinic is driven more by financial gain than by genuine patient care. I cannot recommend it.

UPDATE:

After reading the clinic’s response, I would like to clarify one detail: I made a mistake regarding the price of the Botox. The correct amount was 12,500 baht. The amount I originally mentioned (30,000 baht) referred to the laser treatment I had done, not the Botox.

That said, I must emphasize that all of my other comments remain exactly the same. It is not true that the clinic provided follow-up. I was the one who had to reach out several times. After the Botox, I developed an allergic reaction and I had to insist repeatedly to get an appointment, because there was no genuine concern shown for the reaction I experienced. I also had to write multiple times to say that my wrinkles had not improved.

I understand the concept of a “natural look,” but there is a clear difference between natural results and no results at all. My wrinkles remain very visible, as can be seen in the photo I am sharing.

I want to make it very clear that nothing I have written is false. Everything I shared about my experience and about what the doctor said to me is true, and it saddens me that this is the attitude of the clinic. I tried many times to express my dissatisfaction directly to the clinic, but the response was always to charge more, never to genuinely resolve my concerns. That is the only reason why I felt the need to write this review.

Furthermore, being threatened with legal action for sharing my honest experience feels extremely unfair and upsetting, especially considering that everything I have said is true. As a healthcare professional myself, I know how important it is to show empathy and prioritize the wellbeing of patients, which is why I find this situation so disappointing.

Lastly, I am not the only one who has felt this way. I personally know other patients who have been to Dr. Patt and who have had the very same impression I did.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2YPbGjQyU3MNf_n6jrelqBkOO-JjHqRV5xUUi9vEh7DwOVjDXMeGfSTHNk3LbS_wx1wBQh9Oe_vr2v02AtP3VSnT_m9nnyiZyWSFtgnM8PxBM2J-_JOCzOcxRt_mtxIBsfugCuJkDWLCE=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Ananda Charlie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYGQ47NjvDkSsYaI3UMbfuy89P9jHn7fWFiE0RIGmzu6jhNoFn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The clinic is beautiful, and the laser is the latest model—very effective. The doctor and staff upstairs are very friendly. His work always looks so natural—I still look like me, but better version!

He also uses a special camera to compare each side of my face and reveal skin details that can’t be seen with the naked eye, which is super fascinating. The wait is a little long for me but after seeing the result, it is totally worth the price and the wait. ( Their complimentary cookies are very good) 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]

ฉีดโบริ้วรอย 50 ยู + ใต้ตา + ร่องแก้ม แต่สรุปคือร่องแก้มยังอยู่เหมือนเดิม 😅 แล้วดันไปเติมหน้าแก้มมาแทน งงมาก ไม่ได้อยากได้ตรงนั้นเลย พอทักไปถามคลินิกบอกรอ7-14วัน ผ่านมา3อาทิตย์แล้วสรุปได้หน้าแก้มมา ร่องยังอยู่

ฟีลเหมือนเน้นปริมาณมากกว่าคุณภาพ โบท็อกฉีดไปก็ยังเห็นรอยเดิมอยู่ แทบไม่ต่างจากก่อนทำ

อีกอย่างนะคะไม่มีเปิดกล่องต่อหน้าค่ะ

ที่ไม่โอเคอีกอย่างคือ ไม่มีการประเมินหน้าเลย ไม่ถาม ไม่แนะนำอะไร มาถึงก็ฉีดเลย หมอผู้หญิงมือหนักมาก ดูแบบไม่ซีเรียสกับการฉีด มาถึงฉีดเลยไม่ดูปัญหาของลูกค้า

โดยรวมคือไม่ประทับใจเลย ใครจะไปฉีด แนะนำให้คิดดีๆก่อนค่ะ ครั้งแรกและครั้งเดียวพอ❌❌❌","Images":null,"When":""}]

I arranged everything via email before leaving Melbourne, and Nipa was amazing — so helpful and responsive in finalising my treatment plan.

In just four days, I had two teeth extracted, a deep clean, a 3-unit bridge, and dentures fitted to cover the front gap until I return in November to complete the rest of my treatment. The clinic is spotless and modern — I was even given a blanket because the air-conditioning was so good! I felt genuinely comfortable and at ease throughout.

Surprisingly, I had no downtime at all apart from waiting for the local anaesthetic to wear off. A few hours later, I was back sipping cocktails and enjoying my holiday! I honestly couldn’t believe how pain-free the whole process was — completely different to my previous experiences in Melbourne.

The technology and service are just as good (if not better) than what I’ve had back home. I was quoted $23K–$24K in Melbourne — I paid $3,380 here for all this work, and my upcoming visit in November (for a 4-unit bridge and 4 veneers) will cost $5,794.46. You do the math! 😄

Highly recommend. My new local — not-so-local — dentist!

My tooth chipped while on holidays and they sorted everything for me. I am very nervous of dentists and have a huge fear of them.  Everyone there put me at ease and made me feel calm. Very gentle doctors and I felt no pain at all.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Xiaodan Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUONRwmIIiIWw3qVSfakCO-Cc3BaTaxsXj62fb0ZZ3vGnJGc0e6FA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Ann is the kindest and most knowledgeable dentist I've ever met. And I have lived in London, Singapore and California. She is absolutely amongst the top dentists compared with doctors I've encountered in all the top private clinic networks worldwide.

My dad had a dental emergency right before the new year, I called ~10 clinics in Phuket in the early evening and they were either closed or fully booked. Dr. Ann's office was the only one that added an emergency slot the next morning for us. She is incredibly patient and answered all of our questions with excellent clarity.

My dad's travel insurance didn't cover dental cost, and Dr. Ann charged us such a modest fee it felt impossible. She said that she lived in Japan in the past and she knew how expensive dental treatment could be, she charges the same fee for Thai people and for foreigners because she wants everyone to be able to afford dental care. We felt extremely lucky to have her taking care of my dad and she did a stellar job fixing his tooth.

Thank you Dr. Ann!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Tara Thomson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTZCujaHJTRWnndJlL-NLAfixks4ry5JXUCVT3LFvHbBVe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have just returned to Perth after having an Endoscopic Brow Lift with Dr Piyapas Pichaichanarong, who is an incredible surgeon. I cannot rate Phuket Plastic Surgery Institute (PPSI) high enough! The team of doctors, nurses and staff members are absolutely incredible, from first point of contact via email in Australia to my last follow up appointment in Phuket two weeks after surgery. Dr Piyapas was very informative, honest and kind, I was a bit nervous about the surgery, but Dr Piyapas, and his Anaesthetist both put me at ease, and they both did a fantastic job before and after surgery. My Anaesthetist was there to wake me up, and managed my pain level straight away back in my private room, along with the lovely nurses who cared for me and checked on me hourly. The level of service at this hospital it unbelievable, the breakfast, lunch and dinners were divine, the food and drinks did not stop coming. Straight after surgery I didn’t look great, my eyes were a bit puffy but I expected worse, and the very next day I looked and felt perfectly fine, to be honest less than a week later you couldn’t even tell. Dr Piyapas, has done an incredible job, I would highly recommend him and his colleagues at PPSI. Also, Phuket is the best place for recovery, not only did I return home looking great with my new brow lift, I had a lovely sun tan, and I also felt mentally calm and relaxed. Thank you to everyone at PPSI.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma Hogan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJ8tPwxyu02rWBRrqcJ0jtlsGg3scpZhVKVkyePuw9KX4AlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went to PPSI (Dr. Sanguan Kunaporn) for a revision after a rupture in one of my implants of 11 years. I’d clearly explained that I had always loved my previous low-profile, natural-looking implants and just wanted the same result. Instead, he chose “Full” profile implants without explaining or discussing it.

He kept focusing on “better cleavage,” dismissed my feedback, and the result is the complete opposite of what I asked for - they look fake, feel very firm and uncomfortable, and have ruined my confidence.

I have been raising this concern with the clinic for the past 8 months and have been dismissed constantly. At no point have they acknowledged the lack of informed consent or provided an explanation of why this decision was made without discussing it with me.

I chose this surgeon for his extensive career and experience (which also meant the highest fee in comparison to his colleagues) with the expectation that he would deliver what I very clearly requested. Unfortunately it seems I picked the surgeon stuck on his idea of what implants should look like and disregards anything that doesn’t align with that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alice Keath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3pubyYtfCU9zj2DmEgOUHjphp-9gDFiBdqHzOSx_iY6_4-PgF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The surgeons might be amazing, but actually talking to them has proven impossible. If you end up talking to someone called "Jason" just ignore the email, start again and hope you get someone else.

After three months with replies from Jason a month apart and no useful information in any of them, he'd suddenly said I was due for male-to-female GRS in a couple weeks and my online consult with Dr.Singto (not the doctor I requested) only a couple of days away. That consult got cancelled a couple hours beforehand because Jason gave me the incomplete and incorrect payment information and part of the bits I had to find and fix myself was incorrect. The information he'd gave me was for partly bit from two separate banks, neither in Phuket, with an address for the transaction that was just a suburb in Phuket with no street address (though not the suburb where the hospital is either).

After sending through more money to cover that (6,000 baht total) with the correct information, which Jason refused to provide me and I still had to go scrounging for myself, the second attempt at a consult was cancelled a couple hours beforehand because, even though all the information was correct, their accounting department doesn't know how to read an international transfer receipt so the last minute consult Jason booked was impossible anyway, because you have to wait two weeks for the money to actually come though. If it comes through, and he hasn't given me the wrong information again.

Despite asking several times, Jason still hasn't given me the correct (or even complete) payment information. This is apparently not an isolated incident with PPSI but is isolated to talking to "Jason" specifically. Pretty sure I'm just going to be left in limbo because there's no way to pay for my consult if the person I'm talking to won't tell me where to send the money.

I would be sure this was a scam if the part where so bad at wasn't specifically the part where they're taking my money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzQPM3xgEW94K2nQVhm5-qLA2aolA7C26kwHkKYXfvMGsJWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service, and outstanding staff. Dr Piyapas is fantastic and an exceptional surgeon. Couldn't fault any aspect from pick-up and transport, to pre-surgery consultations, post surgery care, follow-up, and of course the results. Highly recommend PPSI, and Dr Piyapas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marilyn Day","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrmeaBz_MNmsBHL9pudgcOp3ozfGPd7yt5XuZb16yfrjFxMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I have to give a low rating as I never got further than one email arranging for a consultation via Joshua. I was trying for an appointment - wrote 3 times - even put urgent! on the title but after giving the initial info - nobody got back to me. So I left Phuket thinking I will try elsewhere - where it follows through with professionalism. Very disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angelina Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKiOSjVg_GoSZUhMMWchIIykJt9_6a5OfVS23JZ4qle56Ml9SZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best Hospital, I think its the biggest hospital in Phuket Thailand, nice and clean. I flight from dubai to phuket for my breast implant surgery,this is my first time to have surgery. I kinda nervous and anxious but this hospital really amazing. Staff very kind and friendly, i have my breast implant with motiva, my surgeon is Dr Sanguan Kunaporn, he is so good, he make me calm, he has a great smile and very very professional, from consulting till operating he always makes me smile and calm.The hospital room like a hotel with 5 stars service, room,bathroom, my bed it’s good clean big, with tv and aircon. Every one hour nurse keep come and check my body temperature and blood pressure, I feel good and safe.The food service very delicious, people’s witnesses breast implant very very painful after woke up from surgery but I feel almost no pain, it’s feel easy and good. I can eat well, walk by my self to wash room. This feeling so amazing, the results will be great and I am really thankful.

Kindly recommend PPSI hospital for plastic surgery","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0BhYcsXnvR2WCGEf9fX-QUh-OLw11EsWAYC-J1VSLrEE8VSEDfEWuS6_oucfm4UvOP21572-a22oROjc4b2ag--dUkuses4CgYN995sqF6uved-6f0qqmggqmvQqpnuXhWZ-Iy=k-no"],"When":"2023-8-20"},{"Name":"Zoe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHo-hddPedRHPbmTEBo6CVqgTtE3VeoYenQxIvN5pVEQ5wrJ7o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently underwent multiple procedures at PPSI with Dr. Piyapas Pichaichanarong, and I cannot recommend him or the entire team highly enough.

From the moment I met Dr. Piyapas, I felt completely at ease. He was warm, honest, and incredibly thorough. He answered all my questions without sugar-coating anything, which I really appreciated — especially travelling alone for major surgery. What truly blew me away was the extra care he showed — knowing I'd had gastric sleeve surgery and needed extra protein for healing, he personally brought me a banana protein shake every day. That simple gesture meant so much and showed how genuinely he cares for his patients.

I had quite an extensive list of procedures done:
✔️ Breast Reduction with Implants
✔️ Vaser Liposuction (Upper & Lower Abdomen, Love Handles, Lower Back)
✔️ Extended Tummy Tuck & Flankplasty (Belt Lipectomy)
✔️ Vaser Liposuction of the Circumferential Thighs (Inner, Outer, and Front Thighs)
✔️ Extended Thigh Lift

They were big surgeries, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. Even my GP back home was seriously impressed with Dr. Piyapas' work — so much so that he asked for his contact details to refer future patients.

Emotionally, the days after surgery were tough — I was extremely emotional and couldn't stop crying, even though I didn't fully understand why. But the nurses and hospital staff were absolutely incredible. Despite the language barrier, I felt cared for, supported, and safe. They showed me so much kindness and respect, and always empowered me to believe I was improving, even on the tough days.

Every time I went for my check-ups, the staff were genuinely happy to see my progress and mobility improving. It made me feel seen and celebrated.

I also have to give a huge thank you to Restored Beauty Getaways, who organised this for me. From the initial booking to the daily check-ins while I was recovering, they made the entire process so smooth and stress-free. Travelling alone for such a big surgery was daunting, but with their support, I never felt alone. I wouldn’t have had the confidence to do this without them.

If you're considering surgery in Thailand, I honestly couldn’t recommend PPSI, Dr. Piyapas, and Restored Beauty Getaways more. Their care, professionalism, and kindness exceeded all expectations. 10/10 — I wouldn’t trust anyone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stfu plz !","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbn9d1Wh84fKc6SW7PAlw42iA6O46tcUfsnRc49TUN-NBGAabu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Botched job by one of the doctor from this hospital. if you ever consider to go here because of the cheap price, just think twice. i have to live my life with one eyelid bigger than the other. the doctor name is boonchai. I've submit the result of the surgery so other patient will do the evaluation. i have the worst experience in here, might as well going to singapore than have a regret like this.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3f-NHljVerWYyPLEYPqQZaLo_4py-rESH16ElANcplI7U8f0PidmMd05tfMJSFAQTJLZWkqfhaYTdAJXucOIiFv3ZuT8M7gProbM_1CAYDJV1a3POprjpG_0BNgZdY6q4w0qXGPQ=k-no"],"When":"2024-4-5"}]

[{"Name":"Lydia Putri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkpoZkYYsNl_Oo4W2D48-VLlfOH-O56heQABoJBLLq6g4wAsp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an incredible experience with Bangkok Plastic Surgery for my breast surgery. I actually found this clinic last minute before flying to Bangkok, and I feel so lucky that I did.

From the very beginning, their team responded incredibly fast and answered all my questions with patience and professionalism. It made me feel safe and confident choosing them even before I arrived in Thailand.

The prices were very reasonable and affordable, but the service and care I received felt truly premium.

I especially want to thank Miss Tak, the manager, who was absolutely amazing. She arranged transportation for me as a special customer and helped coordinate everything smoothly. She explained every detail of the procedure and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. Her kindness and professionalism made a huge difference in my experience.

The clinic itself was very clean, modern, and well organized. The whole team was friendly and supportive throughout my surgery journey.

A big thank you to Mr. Pichet and the entire medical team for helping me achieve my dream breast surgery. I’m so grateful for their care and expertise.

If anyone is looking for a trustworthy and professional plastic surgery clinic in Bangkok, I highly recommend Bangkok Plastic Surgery.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2wvpI5r013VcWQCGt7jHsye8K-VhbpgjguJu5OnL0nGM64hbO8bjF79kPCWNxI9gl4QbeJKcchwax4FmZOCE8MDv11gvOiEkn_KHQ0CuJd4RkN4SUyIJEsvK-6hlk13owXfErNDUMvlCFp=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1r3uhuDsNKKlh41_XAoeuLYOIX3OzLQOt0lGcNu_t0a9sVVVGGSRdlNRjnWuSIfTX8APzN9E7hhlWGBBWG4w8CRXkWmhf8uVSzuvurAIFdS2MVeRXcHDqYVGGHppsNLYuwkeGYIE57nLM=k-no"],"When":"2026-3-9"},{"Name":"Tiffany Anne Applegarth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYnbgtzMVieGWYBKi1TeyCIfPdE1O-EQLXhFTRbMNtpE0IvL7D=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent care and staff,  providing superb after care, with an outstanding team of nurses.  All the staff and medical team were friendly, helpful, but professional.
I underwent a scrotal skin graft vaginaplasty with full orchiectomy.  Now this is a complex and lengthy operation, but all pre-op checks were thorough, including chest x-ray, ECG (EKG), and interview with psychiatrist/Phycologist and all included in package.
The operation seemed to go well, and spent 4 days in the clinic recovering, and looked after by nurse team.  Then, well for me, when all the dressings came off and packing removed,  I had suffered greater than usual swelling,  above normal, but was reassured by the Surgeon,  everything would be OK.  Which it was :)
I had to wait for 2 weeks of recovery from Initial operation and general anaesthetic,  but was then taken back under for corrective surgery, to correct my adverse swelling.  This was all included and was to provide the results I had expected and the Dr had reassured me that they would be.  This surgery was basically a Libia-Plasty, to ensure a better natural looking result, and to reduce where the swelling that was in excess.
The dressings came off the same day, but redressed for the night, to avoid any chances of infection. The next day, everything was removed, and the results were much more pleasing and as expected.
I was certified fit to fly, as my flights home were just the next day.
On return to UK. I got myself re-checked by medical team, just for my own peace of mind, and to ensure I was following correct care procedures.
I was comforted to find out everything did look good, no signs of possible infections,  and the care plan given was robust,  and I had nothing to worry about.
So all in all, a great service provided, with a good outcome, great after care, and was given great advice to follow on returning home, to keep healthy and recover well.   I would recommend the BPS clinic to friends and others who are looking for advice.
I would like to thank, Dr Pichet Richardson,  Ms Tak and her team, for my care whilst in Bangkok, and for going above and beyond in keeping me safe and well.
Tiffany Anne x","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cyrene Leonard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvbkkWC7w5a9aQr27kklQJ5unN9sf_xpVCFmeElEPQhSoHKm4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best experience at Bangkok Plastic Surgery. This was my first time ever having surgery, and on top of that it was in a different country, so I was really nervous. Miss Pak and her team made me feel comfortable from the very start.

The clinic and facilities are great, everyone is so welcoming, and everything ran smoothly and efficiently. Communication before the surgery was quick, clear, and really detailed.

Dr. Pichet was wonderful and I am incredibly happy with the results!

Thank you so much to everyone at BPS. I would highly recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christian H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlcxtvW7hXSyMF6VmOn8aU6HOX5lGBH5GBvF3NX3L4x4DpCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I had an outstanding experience with Facial Feminization Surgery (FFS) at Bangkok Plastic Surgery and can highly recommend this clinic.

Dr. Pitched did an exceptional job — extremely professional, highly skilled, and with an excellent understanding of facial feminization. From the first consultation to the final results, I felt safe, respected, and in the best possible hands. The outcome looks natural and beautifully balanced, and it has exceeded my expectations.

A very special thank you to Ms. Tak for her excellent care and support throughout the entire process. She was always kind, attentive, and incredibly helpful, explaining every step clearly and making sure all details were perfectly organized. Her support made the whole experience smooth, comfortable, and stress-free.

Overall, Bangkok Plastic Surgery offers outstanding expertise in facial feminization combined with warm, professional, and compassionate patient care. I am truly grateful to the entire team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Becca Ramsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfzUiJrEzUs5I3rIcDU-V3lqtj9OU_uWkLfrRSAT0GsPgeRA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can not say enough positive things about BPS! From the first text message, months out, to the surgery day, and all through recovery - I felt lots of comfort and peace about the surgery. I know have had 3 surgeries with them (breast enlargement and lipedema removal surgery). I fly from America just because the service is always 5 star! Tak, one of the nurses answers every one of my text messages and questions! She always makes sure my pain is managed, when I am nerves - she calms me, and makes sure that all travel back and forth is smooth. She prepares enough supplies so that once you leave the country, you have everything you need. All of the nurses there take the BEST care of you. I needed to wash my hair and I could not and they did it + blow dried it for me?!? You will NEVER find this care anywhere else. Dr. Pichet will answer all of my text messages with question months before surgery and months after surgery. He truly cares about each of his patients and does an amazing job! The driver that takes you back and forth to the hotel is top notch. Always on time, a great driver, and he would stop and let me get a smoothie on the way home! I would recommend Bangkok Plastic Surgery to anyone! 5 STARS!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richenda Ingram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUf4zFLfaUUy-WDSEVeNBcv9Y9S5OaOj_JzvU7SDikQAlp0mO7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am truly pleased with the results of my procedure at Bangkok Plastic Surgery. From the very beginning, I found BPS to be a close-knit, highly professional team who carried out their work with care, diligence, and compassion.

Dr. Pitchet, who leads the practice, is both distinguished and gentle. He doesn’t need many words — his presence, gestures, and warm smile speak volumes. The atmosphere, already one of genuine care, rises to another level of calm focus when he enters the room, and his staff respond attentively to his few but thoughtful directions.

The practice is managed by Miss Tak, whose cheeky, joyous personality immediately puts you at ease. She explains the procedure in detail, guides you through the paperwork, and makes herself available almost around the clock — a reassurance I greatly appreciated, even if I didn’t need to call on it. The wider team — including Miss Ann, Miss Tim, and Miss Koy — provided attentive, professional care, handling everything from blood tests and heart checks to X-rays with kindness and thoroughness.

After the procedure the aftercare continues seamlessly. Checkups, and ongoing aftercare are all carefully managed by Miss Tak. Miss Tak remains a constant source of support, putting you at ease, guiding you step by step through recovery and reminding you of important milestones as life gradually returns to normal.

Bangkok Plastic Surgery is a tightly run, humble, yet exceptionally professional practice. I am deeply grateful for their expertise, their kindness, and the outstanding care they provided at every stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jerry Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdDEfuyo8CoHwCUOea3EtsrvsTKHS39Ipw4PXUBaRyLx_RpLlS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service beyond my expectations! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-MRW6Xu4qJaKwnBA9GR1JFARWfKAqE_fGz39MIO-QwT0wl5n8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"WOW!    The front office at "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute" could REALLY work on their manners and follow up.

Coastal Skin & Eye Institute's new fancy website that promises "comprehensive and personalized service" and to be treated "like family" is nothing more than something a PR firm dreamed up and was paid to post on line.  Apparently those who answer the phone and who are suppose to schedule appointments never got the memo.

What their fancy advertising doesn't mention is that they don't seem care about you or why you might need to come in.  They never ask.  All they care about is how they are going to GET PAID.

I don't appreciate the runaround and having my time wasted, having to contact the office MULTIPLE TIMES, filing out forms on line and then being told I have WAIT to have their "referral coordinator" TO APPROVE a written referral from my primary care doctor.  After trying to set up an appointment twice on the phone: I was curtly told "they would be calling me back within a week".  That came and went.... still waiting.

Long story short:  I reached out to my primary care doctor for a referral.  He gave me a referral for "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute".  I went on line on the "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute" fancy new website... per their "book online" request, filled out the ENTIRE ZOCDOC forms with my PRIVATE information including photos of drivers license, insurance info etc. etc.   And CONFIRMED an appointment.

The next day, I received a call cancelling my appt, because the doctor I selected doesn't accept Sharp. I tried to schedule another appointment with another doctor, they refused.  I called back a few days later again, with my NEW referral in hand for Dr. Ambur... and again one of the members of Coastal's Miss Congeniality team refused to make an appointment for me.

Maybe Dr. Austin Ambur is a great doctor, but I'll never know. And don't bother to ask to see a woman doctor, they let me know that was an impossible option.

At this point, I am going to find another dermatology office without the attitude.

Signed
A Retired RN and Senior","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3hh25wx9wsBuS7qu24kFQ3iLXHVQGN3Lw8wnczzwIt-5Ez4BbA0jBCbCxOsMALIGdj4cskJzlylSuoLk8pdkKoeA4IakHVKiLqQ-W14PaGNyfi54q0v3a-Ls7JgJG3SK_VtCUye6qX7OM=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0hMH3XTeVS4dc2gwJsTHgWGnWG3CgvuZCJ1rAmf0U2sXweRiM-Jf_wrXUnlPWbkv4bIsx1mT6xaZKfSuKlNzqKIguXCPnkrSc5sPMRP-gC2BWH5g3Bo-WSYoW-PD12YwSA1pIYi5ycHTbQ=k-no"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Ann marie Hein","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhT_W6HjJt449pF1aHjV3pzkDGCotPf7WPv_escdX4zGfd4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The nurse practitioner I saw had me get blood work to help determine my skin condition.
