user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Samira Moshtaghi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTRurRP-EaTs7k_hFdwoBScAHNVUarWRAyupbEEYu2OmoTZHaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Spinal decompression truly works like a miracle. I was at a point where almost every doctor told me I needed back surgery because my herniated disc had grown from 2mm to 10mm. Hearing that I needed surgery devastated me, I didn’t want to go through an operation and I honestly felt hopeless.

I was dealing with severe lower-back pain every single day. The pain shot down my left leg all the way to my foot because of sciatica. I would wake up in pain, and even walking for a few minutes caused numbness and shooting pain. It affected my mood, my routine, and my entire quality of life. I felt stuck and exhausted.

Then I found spinal decompression, and it completely changed my life. After my sessions here, the improvement has been unbelievable. The pain that I was living with every day is gone. I still can’t believe how much better I feel. It truly feels like a miracle and I am beyond happy and grateful.

A huge thank you to Dr. Pantea Nikayin and Mr. Masoud. They are incredibly kind, patient, and professional. Their positive energy, care, and experience made me feel supported and confident throughout the process. I am so grateful for their help and compassion.

If you’re suffering from a herniated disc or sciatica and you think surgery is your only option, please try spinal decompression first. I am living proof that healing without surgery is possible.
This treatment gave me my life back. Highly, highly recommend","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0orOz4aph7M_RK15D1HakAvuLb4RHieF52GPcwBnDVOIQM9t1tptCf7Stz99FTSCwLf9FzCmgQjtJVAa5BCRCGdUdxaFgAhPfOCeE_kInqA6hEFohQOrjsoS1cZutsULGFcnuaEfjYBwPH=k-no"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Hripsime Grigoryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGA6L7r6pBwyvL4kWR-aOGyPAXK0R1LKS0V4K1cavfTmq8i8dI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience at Golden Health & Beauty Center. They began with a thorough consultation, explained the process clearly, and made sure I felt comfortable every step of the way. During my visit, I also learned that they offer a wide range of services, including Botox and other advanced treatments, and they have a nurse on site, which made me feel even more confident and safe.

Bita did my microneedling, and she was absolutely amazing — so professional, kind, and knowledgeable. She made the entire process feel easy and comfortable, and she truly did an incredible job.

The customer service overall was exceptional — everyone was friendly, welcoming, and helpful from beginning to end. The space was clean, professional, and had such a calming atmosphere.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and will definitely be coming back. Highly recommend to anyone looking for quality aesthetic services and excellent care","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lou L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBBsYyxtMdj7GKZoLWNjF6Tp3-71TTF1F21Vni7U_IT3_MGKROZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place. She is always checking in on me and always available, as I have also seen her be with her other patients. After exhausting other options and almost giving in to surgery, this treatment restored not just my physical function, but my hope and most importantly my quality of life. I highly recommend Golden Health and Beauty Center to anyone suffering from chronic back pain or sciatica before considering surgery or even after failed surgery. Before finding Dr. Nikaeen at Golden Health and Beauty Center, I lived in constant, debilitating pain for over a year and a half. I had severe lower back pain with sciatica radiating down my leg, numbness in my toes, and I relied on a cane daily just to walk. I had no quality of life, requiring help for small things like putting on socks, cooking, and cleaning, let alone not being able to work.  The pain was relentless—day and night—and I couldn’t sleep or function normally.
I had previously undergone 39 spinal decompression treatments on a DRX9000, at two different chiropractic offices, without any improvement. By the time I came here, I was physically exhausted and emotionally discouraged. Thousands of dollars later and over a year of my life, I had no improvement.
After committing to over seven months of spinal decompression care with Dr. Nikaeen, I experienced real, measurable improvement. Her approach is methodical, personalized, and grounded in clinical understanding rather than one-size-fits-all treatment. Her treatments have consisted of electric stimulation, heat therapy, manual massage, machine massage, cupping therapy, shockwave, and my favorite laser therapy. Also, the spinal decompression table she uses can be moved laterally so there is no pain during the treatment on the side of the body experiencing sciatica. All these modalities have helped me every single visit, lowering my pain levels little by little every appointment. My pain is now localized to my lower back and a bit on my glute, I can now walk more, stand straight, and am able to do all of the stretches Dr. Nikaeen has prescribed. Over time, my pain levels decreased significantly, my mobility improved, the sciatica and numbness subsided, and I no longer need a cane. Most importantly, I can finally sleep through the night again, I have not taken any pain medication in over 4 months, my mental health is at a healthy and hopeful place. We are continuing with treatment in the hopes that I can be as close to pain free as possible, I am so grateful that Dr. Nikaeen is continuing treatment with me. She has also made sure that my health insurance covers treatments, which I am so thankful for after spending thousands prior to coming to her. Her whole team is professional, kind, empathetic and care about my improvement. I feel so blessed to have found Dr. Nikaeen and her team! The best in the Valley! Thank you Dr. Nikaeen and team! I have attached a portion of my MRI to show how much disc were protruding before I started treatment.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn20FldBtFNeApa9VK3o2BUy6njj7lBXxOqDYwEddQXLJrQv5LGTJUE9Z4Ngvhd8SKmLClGn-pKUE-ct9KPOXNKABe6mc1nLurGv3ULy152pIlWXgTXRiQUkKjN9PNuA37xK58R2kGbMvDb-=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0JV6lHorXoEUW1agu619cRFVUm2y3HBkyia2FQFtBkwEu_zqC71FQ2GCn3ZzvC_2NPxO8N7y9BGUkv4O7A4066bHUA_M09BnuUC03r4W2Ucx5V2Db1kEcHsh5e26rZO_hNbD4CtmpMqlwX=k-no"],"When":"2025-12-16"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Roxy Inouye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7LyAYaGQ3Wji8e6euOotxfEAb1nC_mHTky_1EY-3NDmv7aw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"May 12, 2013

Dear Dr. Nassif,

Words cannot adequately express my gratitude for what you have done for me. I came to you with a deformed nose after three rhinoplasties. I felt extremely self-conscious.  In fact, although I am a “people person,” I left my home only reluctantly. My husband even went grocery shopping for me. Fortunately, I was able to secure a position with my employer that allowed me to work from home. Yet, thanks to your handiwork, I felt confident enough to return to the office after my last surgery and am so much happier. I no longer feel the need to isolate, because I look and feel like myself again – finally.

You used the latest technology to lower my nasal tip, giving me a normal nose one again. My nostrils are now covered with the grafts harvested from my own septum. I love the fact that the implant you inserted to extend my tip eventually dissolved, leaving me with a natural nose free of artificial materials. My nose is now symmetrical, as is the rest of my face. In addition, you corrected my deviated septum, which relieved my chronic nasal obstruction. My chin implant looks awesome, too!

You were so patient and kind to me throughout my entire rhinoplasty journey. Your explanations were very detailed. I knew exactly what to expect every step of the way. I understood that we were aiming for improvement, not perfection, and that final results take time. Grafts take a while to settle in, and the swelling after revision surgery can last for many months. You did your best to ensure that my expectations were always realistic. I also so much appreciated the special care and consideration provided by your wonderful and professional office staff.

Life is hard enough without having to worry about facial disfigurement.  Thank you for making my life (and that of my family) so much easier!

Sincerely,

Roxy
Colorado Springs, CO","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Hunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp3PT1QDYB1nBpTnia-EYDuw-3RnKSM0JPPUrUDueSWEr2uQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to Dr Paul Nassif's office for a hydrafacial with Aubrie. I was quite satisfied with all aspects of my visit. The waiting room was comfortable with 'spa' water available while you wait. Always a plus! The receptionist were friendly & helpful as well.
I had never had a hydrafacial before & didn't know what to expect. Aubrie was fantastic. She explained the procedure to me. And asked what my skin concerns were. I told her & she customized the facial for my personal issues. I liked the products she used on me. She suggested several things she thought would be good for my skin type. But wasn't pushy at all. And when I didn't get any of them, she was fine. I left that day with glowing, hydrated happy skin! And, it stayed hydrated for a while after my facial. Oh, and she's great at extracting mila. Not every facialist is good but she did a fantastic job.
I give her and Dr Paul Nassif's office 5 stars...and I'm going back next month for the same facial...and probably going to buy the retinol cream Aubrie recommended for me. Excited to have glowing skin again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"brian fozzard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6hUsZDDFp-pv5I5Z4XLrxeR4KpgBZk2T9HeVw2D2ExeMfJvXhpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I flew to L.A from Florida just to see the doctor....got some work on my nose...it was a first class experience from start to finish","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nati Cascales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRG_QW3QlXMmdIE_rFHCVQ_7vJKZXGOrPKGZuQFvfYbgxvL1kF5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pues yo no sé lo que cuesta una operación, para mí hija que está con el tabique nasal destruido, por qué cuando era niña le trataron con aerosoles, y con los años también estuvo presente la cocaína, pero ya gracias a Dios todo se acabó, lo que no está nada bien,es el tabique y no puede respirar por la nariz, y se le forman mucha mucosidad el la nariz y garganta, ...

[{"Name":"Ayah Helmy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCMa4CnfzTlpIimlZ5eoBb7yXXXyyXM42NGwkyjyf_W7HhUOkw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have a complicated surgical history and cannot recommend Dr Rahban and his team enough. I am an attorney and entrepreneur, so I do my research and I expect good results for the money that I spend. I am very pleased with my experience and my results with Dr R.

It was a tall order for me to find the right doctor because not only was I looking for a doctor who specializes in post-weight loss body lifts, but one who specializes in revisions. I waited until I have had about 8 months of healing and normalizing since my first surgery to post this review because I wanted to be thorough and honest. And, honestly, I can recommend both Dr Rahban and his team without reservation. Not only are they friendly and helpful, but I am quite particular about my results and so is Dr Rahban. He is meticulous in his work and his incisions are very precise. Despite all the scarring and unconventional issues I am bringing to his surgical table, he has been able to give me results that have really shifted my self perception and improved my life- even with 2 out of 3 surgeries left to go!

Thank you, Dr R and team. I look forward to continuing to work with you to achieve my dream body. See you all soon :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Cortes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJN9MElgvntDSpPViCYEEVhDngW351R5XwhAvkU1g8z10HNZDv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got a breast reduction surgery on October 10,2025 with Dr. Rahban. My breast reduction surgery is something I had considered and needed for almost 10 years before finally deciding to move forward. After extensive research and multiple consultations, I chose Dr. Rahban, and I couldn’t be happier with that decision.
From the very first appointment, I appreciated Dr. Rahban’s honesty and knowledge. He thoroughly explained every detail of the procedure, why he chose a specific method, how it would benefit my body, and what would realistically work for me. He set clear and realistic expectations, which made me feel confident and informed. His attention to detail is truly impressive—he noticed that my skin was extremely prone to scarring based on past injuries, something I didn’t even mention, and was able to determine this during our first consultation.
I am now a little over three months post-op, approaching four months, and my scarring is minimal compared to what I had anticipated. Some areas are still healing, but the most visible parts have little to no scarring at all. This has helped tremendously with my confidence, especially in an area I’ve always felt self-conscious about due to the size of my breasts. I am incredibly grateful for the care and time Dr. Rahban took to minimize scarring and prioritize the long-term results.
The preparation and care provided by Dr. Rahban and his entire team—from the initial consultation to surgery day and post-operative care—are absolutely crucial, especially for a procedure as complex as a breast reduction. Every team member played an important role in my journey: Layla during my initial inquiry, Tiffany greeting me at the front desk, Sally helping schedule my appointments, Dr. Rahban answering every question and easing my anxiety at each visit, and Lety providing thorough pre- and post-operative care instructions. Together, they made a huge impact on both my physical and mental well-being throughout this experience.
This was my first major surgery, and I couldn’t be more thankful for my choice of Dr. Rahban and his team. I would absolutely consider Dr. Rahban for any future procedures and will confidently recommend him to my family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ben Nab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPBh02qQb4fSqdAu5gHq291hh3qmh1AzJc-0yrbt8rxCY3j1A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would like to extend my sincere appreciation to Dr. Rahban and his entire staff for taking exceptional care of me with outstanding professionalism and compassion. As a medical provider with many years of experience, I had extremely high standards when choosing a plastic surgeon for my tummy tuck after two C-sections.
I consulted with more than five surgeons and took three years to make my decision. I can confidently say there is no one I would trust more than Dr. Rahban. What truly sets him apart is that he does everything himself, which gave me complete confidence in my care and results. His approach is comprehensive, safe, precise, and artistic, and he genuinely cares about how his results look. Dr. Rahban treats each patient with the highest level of attention and integrity, and it clearly shows in his Work.  High Recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Kinzel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiSBJNdqmUlx28Q5RLSmbfEls55ILqGy-8XFJgoFrIM97SSc0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One year anniversary of my abdominoplasty, and my only regret is that I didn’t do it sooner. It changed my life.

For years I struggled with abdominal pain, core weakness, and a stomach that never improved despite diet and exercise. After having giant babies,  no amount of exercise was helping to repair me. I tried everything before considering surgery—years of physical therapy, strengthening programs, local consultations, Emsculpt, anything I could find besides surgery.

I asked my OBGYN for a consultation with a surgeon, to see what my options were. She reluctantly referred me, and when I consulted with the VA surgeon, he matter-of-factly told me that surgery would not change my quality of life or the pain. After living with my results for a year, I can confidently say that for me, his statement was not true.

Emotionally, it was difficult at times as well. I remember overhearing strangers wondering if I was drinking while pregnant, or commenting while I was at the beach catching waves with my kids about how I was doing that while pregnant. Those moments stayed with me. I know I shouldn’t let other people’s opinion bother me, but it definitely bummed me out.

After years of contemplating,  I met two women within a months time, who had undergone abdominoplasty with muscle repair. One had surgery locally. She initially told me she was very happy and encouraged me to just do it because she had no regrets. A few months later, however, she shared that she was having complications and would need another surgery. Another woman I met had her surgery with Dr. Rahban and told me he was absolutely the best surgeon and that she never once regretted the investment because of how much better she felt afterward. Hearing both of those experiences played a big role in my decision to have the surgery. I was happy to have ran into the one gal that mentioned Dr. Rahban, because I had already done a ton of research on him back in 2019, and she assured me that he truly was as great as he seemed. That’s when I made the call and scheduled my consultation. After my consultation, I knew that Dr. Rahban was who I wanted as my surgeon.

Since my surgery, my core is stronger than it has been in 14 years. I’m finally able to work out and see real results again. I also haven’t had a single abdominal “Charlie horse” since surgery, which used to happen regularly (so painful). The improvement in my strength and physical comfort has truly changed.

I feel more confident, more comfortable in my body, and I am able to keep up with my very active kids and family again.

I’m so glad I made that call and scheduled the consultation. I never once felt rushed or pressured. Everyone in the office was kind, supportive, and professional, and I’m incredibly grateful for the care I received.

If you’re on the fence like I was for years, I would encourage you to at the least schedule the consultation. I’m so thankful I met someone who encouraged me to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"heather desurvire","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrL2tJKDloUsB_vP0uSVkQHB_dKFlDYES5EABCrotQLkyC4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In the past I’ve had experiences both good and very bad with cosmetic surgeons. I am quite discerning as a result when choosing a surgeon. Dr Rahban, from the onset, gave me the confidence I was with an expert surgeon who is not only meticulous, precise, extremely knowledgeable but also a perfectionist. All the qualities you’d want in a surgeon.

In the past I unfortunately had liposuction about 20 years ago on my stomach and upper arms. After a few years, the result unfortunately and unexpectedly l to get scar tissue that created an awfully bumpy and quite ughly stomach and crinkly upper arms with bumps and crevices, even though I’m fit and thin.
I do a lot of water sports so looking good in a bikini was very important to me. I tried everything. Rolfing, lasers, creams, you name it. So many promised so much with no results. I finally realized I had to handle this surgically. I consulted with many surgeons including one who suggested a reverse tummy tuck, another which would leave a vertical scar on the front of my stomach. No bueno.

Well thankfully it was serendipity I heard Dr Rahban  on a podcast talk about this very thing, a reverse Tummy tuck would result in a scar in a few years that would migrate downwards due to gravity. Well I’ve had enough of bad cosmetic procedures.. His authority on tummy Rich’s, the right approach and the wrong ones, and evidenced by  many before and after photos of his work demonstrated to me I needed to consult with him.

During my consult he immediately saw the problem via scars from liposuction, and has seen and dealt with this many times. He explained that the only way to deal with the scars was a full tummy tuck and arm surgery.

I knew Dr Rahban was the real thing and knew what it would take to get the best result. I knew he would give me the best result possible.  He also does the stitches himself, usually handled by a PA, and does this meticulously so the scar will end up unnoticeable. From that consultation on, and most importantly on the day of surgery,  I was very confident all would work out well!

It’s 6 weeks post op and I could not be happier. I basically got my body back but better!! I have an adorable belly button, flat stomach and arms that I can once again confidently wear tanks & bathing suits. He even fixed a hernia I didn’t realize I had.  Woohoo!  The scars already look incredible and I know in several months they’ll be unnoticeable.

Dr Rahban is a magician. He is also so friendly, enthusiastic and passionate about the results. I would not go to anyone else for a tummy tuck and brachioplasty. His results are unmatched and you will feel you are and will be in the most skilled and knowledgeable hands. Thank you so much Dr Rahban!! I’m so grateful.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3nN0h8hYS4VICkXcj7U9_Am076BXiabiyIgu0hIS5hKOkplWfzFoljjwNTAMx2VvFtWYSQkhsno9hKvw0LdjnVObvPrVQKUUOerIo7819xlcw306nmA3F7D1wbOd5wotdRCxlSxNGDQ6ci=k-no"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Tina Vanatur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGj1lfBbA-SwZTcX5i1NQzHYpvNsvmVDpveZMtUPFjrHN7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The experience i had with Dr Rahban was simply unspoken of. First of all his entire office personnel are extremely sweet, friendly and accommodating, they go above and beyond to make you feel special. From the first moment Dr Rahban walked into the room, he filled the room with positivity, honesty and genuine care. He listens to your needs and takes his time to give you his professional and honest opinion. And quite frankly, its extremely rare nowadays to find such a reputable doctor that is willing to take his time to explain everything in details, so your decision to proceed with any procedure is made with clear awareness and expectation.
However what makes Dr Rahban THE doctor to go to are the results he delivers. He is a true artist, and an amazing one who appreciates beauty, for to revise human appearance should take nothing less than an artist. He simply has the talent to vision the beauty he can achieve and has the skills like no one else to actually deliver the results far beyond the expected.
Dr Rahban’s attention during recovery and care for the results delivered are so genuine, that feels even personal.
If there were more Dr Rahban’s in the world creating beauty, the world would be so much more of a beautiful place to live in!!!!
Thank you Dr Rahban!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Veronica Crystal Mejia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlG0tc7GO0j__pRRTaUahlR0QBDJrKEWEwgGhDLeJVCS4wAnkG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So grateful for Dr. Rahban and his team. I will recommend the wizard over and over again to all my friends and family. This was my first surgery so I was a bit nervous but I can't thank Rady and his team enough for making this such a seamless experience for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"candace cooley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGARfnLlZF_zS-jda7woZCrZU4UPybgpoceve7iOLkhiYFug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a physician with over 30 years of experience, I can say with confidence that Dr. Rahban’s work is extraordinary. [{"Name":"P Sepulveda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWvbPSxqIhjAayyhCQXM693l2U5oouMJc3s76K4B9NGbi6wc3D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went for BOTOX injections, Dr. Alexander does not longer take care of his patients at this location, instead it is his nurse practitioner which by far has NOT the same results at all as when Dr. Sinclair did the applications, not even close. Personally I don’t recommend it.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2ALKFk0KNjYVqXQfnxYZ5u0QZ7DVWnfWTHXgN-rgex8M5sgipmGjnsxvtnAwRY_QuxB6IhHWe5JNmnYyp4j6KunbO_Jmt_a9WPFPAB9ZA5TtUI9p5dYPdTJ-cTmPESPARUDyoX2udsnpm5=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2v_2-1cj26RhaBUeOCOL60sSYYbloQw466FHa0eNdI9B-kfXWepQ_ZywiscdoHIfIUsmHqatZLTp4yEWKFRdRBHm87rylg7kbJ7oRv3kDXM4wKD80NEpIqCA65vIVETnI5qPUySPlO49s=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2627QE3hOmenHjcWm25of-zq5CRQgFfsHYg5G31tMym3V0sfT_aC3_WbU6W2-Hu1HaBXfZadThZjDt4CDVoeFyz99v-gKq2J-AWohdginSuzoX5d8wORLuURSR1oQoLKrCIwfF9TwuaIw=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1iuv9wCRTzbmSypyhnSGKWqOY2r1mWIYak1A83bUQHFEf7GaPZz8gfPm6hlaJUfvIGUR-HCknxozMh1scE041M6OP4ASn1jWAHTJGZ20N9e-y0IsiI73VNKhNhD7Hwu8nBvmhcd5_sZUJX=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3vPRaXzyv_r7wD3Y19iOgoXE2BuF7awNGJk3_7xV4_6jgSZ1Ts-llWIX9M-7RvcuKp3k_QZRMp6X-TDssxd321GonHRJz7fk_gCpvibmqjK7ZMJk6OeDCTXeW_4maFR7HnwvzG50fim5dV=k-no"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"A O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiRGPo0hqhivVNVdkfqgZCNlkrTw_gkhcGjSBBGw8RQD-vHWU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"BEWARE !!! I was referred to this surgeon through my insurance and sincerely deeply regret it. Don’t be fooled, he looks great on paper and I was so excited when I was first referred to him. I had a previous review but wanted to update it as more has unfolded. I’ve had two breast augmentations with Alexander Sinclair, my first and a revision. He wanted to try to revise them again with two more surgeries. One to remove them for a year and then another breast augmentation after a year of having no implants. After the initial 2 very poor breast aug experiences I was absolutely traumatized and terrified of this man. Compassionate is not a word I’d ever think of to describe Alexander as he would belittle my experiences and gaslight me. Horrible bedside manner. If you’re lucky he will get it right the first time , if he doesn’t GO SOMEWHERE ELSE. Do not let him try to revise as he is awful at revisions. At this point I searched for another surgeon however , I cannot obtain pre op photos of me before any breast augmentation because Alexander lost the files. That’s right he did my first breast aug March 2023, it is September 2024 and he lost all access to the files/photos of my chest preop. Files that should be held and kept recorded in a just manner in accordance to HIPPA regulation. Not only did he fail my revision but now has made it extremely difficult for another surgeon to fix . His reason: his computer crashed and he had no back ups. Awful personality, projects own desires of surgery ( he did not listen to my needs or expectations as this was made obvious after reading his medical notes of my surgeries, which also included contradictions and incorrect info). If you’re a trans person reading this, please go get a second opinion, just because he can give you a quick date with a quick turn around should not be a reason to go because obviously they have too many patients that they can’t keep track of your records. Unethical, unprofessional, I absolutely cannot believe tax payers money went to covering services with this man. I had my primary care provider (new) , and multiple women at a local wellness center tell me how unhappy they were with his services, his behavior, bedside manner, and results. She has helped feel confident with my skin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristina Leano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSlNHawTGfbAKaYZopWnXPO5jNy3eAvZNJfimbnDK2roDfGS1Jbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muchisimas gracias a todo empleados en Skeen. Dr. Benjamin Vega me ayuda con "acute eczema" y me dio un plan de tratamiento perfecto. En solo 2 dias, mi cara esta recuperando muy bien y me siento mejor :) Gracias a todos!!

Huge thanks to the whole staff and Dr. Benjamin Vega at Skeen.  I moved to Rosarito 2 years ago from Los Angeles and this was my first time visiting a dermatologist here.  For the past month, my skin was hypersensitive after a horrible allergic reaction to expired makeup (I didn't realize it was 3+yrs expired at the time I used it) and my face/eyelids/neck were so swollen and irritated.  I found Skeen on IG/Google Maps and reached out via WhatsApp.  The staff was super helpful and friendly :) They scheduled an appointment for me that Saturday (where in the USA can you get a derm appt within 24 hours notice on a weekend?!?! nowhere!)  and the moment I walked into the Skeen office, I felt relieved.  The office is nice and tucked away in a small plaza next to the Calimax grocery store on the main blvd past the Pabellon mall.

Dr. Vega took one look at me and immediately understood my situation. He assessed my skin, looked at the products I had been using (I brought in the makeup and skin care items I used in the past month since the original incident) and he typed out a whole treatment plan for me in English and Spanish.  He made sure I understood each product he prescribed and due to the acute eczema, he instructed me to go back to the very basics - cleanser and moisturizer ONLY.  My skin has to heal before he does any further allergy tests or recommendations to move forward with makeup and other skin care.  He was patient and answered every question I had.  I look forward to our follow up in 1 month to see how my skin has progressed (in the last 2 days since our consultation my skin is already SO MUCH BETTER) and how we can make sure my skin stays healed and hydrated long term.

Again, huge thank you to everyone at Skeen, the nursing, scheduling, assistant staff and the doctors.  Thanks Dr. Vega!  Muchisimas gracias!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nicole renaud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2Uoz2PRR2y25vSMMccYuVYDN9KRJ_CGtDJ5Z2RjZxr7JsXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient since 2018. Previously all treatments were done by high end doctors in California.  Once I found Dr. Ramos I have only been treated at Skeen.

If you wish an injectable go to her, she will not upsell you or push additional services. In the past have asked to have a little more filler and she prefers to wait and see how I look before adding it. And when it settles, I see that she was correct. I didn't need any more and left with money in my pocket. She is conservative and an artists when implementing any procedure.

In addition, none of the products are diluted. She will show you the original packaging and remove the injectable from it. This insures the product you are paying for is what you want and is not a substitute.

She is often attending seminars in France and Mexico City, etc. to  learn about the latest research and technologies in skin care and specifically how to reduce facial lines and other anti- ageing
techniques.

The office staff is excellent. No scheduling or billing errors. Beautiful office, beautiful doctors, beautiful staff and a beautiful result.

Dr. Ramos has kept years off my face! I am a forever client!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darcie Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1--jkJea93Z5-d_P4z5cmKE_36YBCElk_e9iKV5xVG4wd6DmPJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience here with Dra. Alejandra Ramos, she was very kind and knowledgeable! After my consultation she recommended a few procedures to me as well as a new skin care routine and my face looks so much better! I would highly recommend this clinic and look forward to returning!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kailee T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBLuHKvUHeuycTnP-6kWbQQCY-D0icGTZJtW6ggK-IhA_5Ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been coming here for about 8 years I love the Doctor and the results but in the past year and a half I have had the hardest time getting seen by the doctor. [{"Name":"Ingrid Yang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIf2IdlGvCCu0VfvOA7jn_PyBSk7L4R2sHVirLfHW1fWCjIJ5fzg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been to so many dermatologists and gotten so many laser treatments, and Dr. Grushchak was hands-down, the best. Usually my laser treatments are so painful (I know, why do I do this to myself but the results are worth it), and Dr. Grushchak asked me to come in an hour early for extra numbing which helped so much! She was also super efficient with the laser, the procedure went so fast I hardly felt a thing. I also had a vein on my temple that had been bothering me for years. I’d asked every plastic surgeon, vascular surgeon, and dermatologist about it, and they said nothing could be done. I asked Dr Grushchak, and she lasered it, and it was literally gone 5 seconds later. I’ve had it for YEARS! And she handled it in seconds! ? Also highly recommend the post treatment PRP. It helped with the pain and speed up healing.? I’m really picky about my doctors and usually only see dermatologists in Korea because Asian skin is so particular, but I trust Dr Grushchak any day! Thank you so much!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1yJy707vEUI6LHJMjU5fktTL-zzzvRYIJo2Cdri_kJMsMRFbJh14U-x0d777f-kfn581F83rA-bNluZk6itOqzj3fKBfX7Xutp-EK1AwxYJ4qUGQffsO7F2wcgZMv0jvrAkw5DREhYKLwD=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3Muq920evnnwJ_k71MpMCufEVlZNqIUHMzpUK_q0gCjml3u1_5TRY09aVPGkKTwzOD39eLgbRH6LOkrV5SNpJabHEjCG9g_NrGw6NPVDKrJqbS1cDmaDdkVGeiZPvMWztUtmJs5Z0avGs=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn28Tx9UzLdGPuRiIQpwFgKLg4CbzRhDe0grK47RuUOtb3yALyGh7ua1bB81CBBYnvh2c4Hg1k5pVmKKlTvNMcVxN87JfNE7jCINLP7g2Wi0NbyL-dvZVklJR0cy2m48QqoiYIl3ih9Giy2X=k-no"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"E W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGbWE-OSwOClXTnTbMj6VYE3fjSJnU3sO1-Xg-qkyd8fxe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a consultation at La Jolla Cosmetic Laser Clinic & Dermatology and it was a very pleasant experience. I was greeted warmly by the receptionist, offered water, and the electronic forms were easy to complete. My consultation with Tammy was extremely informative — she was knowledgeable, answered all my questions, and showed me before/after photos. I never felt rushed and felt completely comfortable throughout. After months of researching procedures, I felt confident enough to book my appointment. Scheduling was easy, and the receptionist also explained parking to avoid tickets. I will update this review after my procedure and any follow-up.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rabee McDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWpcTWdjboGgXWF1cLA2RpZKQU5NZ5KECwx88vvHNtCLay4AZo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to La jolla Laser Clinic by both my doctor and my facialist. I finally took the plunge and made an appointment with Dr. Mani.
From the minute I walked in, I was greeted with a smile.  The paperwork was pretty painless and I was seen right on time.
The office is extremely organized and well run.  Having had my own dental practice for 30 plus years, I know how hard it is to make such a seamless and positive experience for patients.  Dr. Mani and her amazing team definitely have the customer service down to a science.
Dr. Mani was so careful with my condition which is very difficult to treat.  She didn't jump in and start going at my face.  She took her time, consulted with peers and when I finally got my laser procedure done, I couldn't even believe the results.  I have spent so much time and money on products for years to resolve my issue .  Nothing has worked so far except the amazing result I got after just one treatment!
I am so happy I can't stop staring at my skin!  I highly recommend La Jolla Cosmetic Laser clinic and Dr. Mani's expertise.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrlV62HvXLsNfh9kHhzENDg4UKxWG3gijUAu0eMLhD7pL16vV6pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at La Jolla Laser Clinic. From the moment I arrived, the staff made me feel comfortable and well cared for. Dr. Grushchak was exceptionally knowledgeable and took the time to explain every step of my scar treatment, which made me feel both informed and assured. Her attention to detail and dedication to achieving the best possible results truly stand out.

The clinic itself is clean, modern, and efficiently run, and the entire team is warm and professional. It’s clear they genuinely care about their patients’ comfort and confidence. I’m thrilled with the results of my procedure and deeply appreciate the care and expertise I received. I highly recommend La Jolla Laser Clinic to anyone seeking skilled, thoughtful, and results-driven dermatologic or cosmetic care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"colleen demling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiSoD1BM8Dm7paJJ246RLH0A0ETZRO9QQepktRLUSIb3aeIw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going here for years for botox and fillers. The staff and doctors are top notch. I've only had positive experiences. I have referred many friends and clients and they all feel the same. The results I get are AMAZING! I would never go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trudy M Seifke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhL6Glfq_4ZGNQeZqja0R9o9eP7rJGmK13DsFIcH-9RGVhOgGa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello, I live in Carlsbad, so it.was a treat to commute to a community I believed would deliver great service and hospitality. The front desk representative was not only friendly but authentic and really listened.  Amazing first impression.  The apprentice? was very calm and informative.  I was not, as I was too excited and anxious. Tammie then arrived said a wonderful hello and began to listen and assess my skin neck and face. I told her my budget and wishes and said go for it as if it's a pallette. Corny , I know and yet Tammie did her professional thing and I really appreciated her advice. Fraxel on Tuesday! Thank you and Happy Holidays.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Levine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVegx_XnXBHJtcmXixrWVuxw0bPBscwtTg7MsKLbo1WBl5t_IEa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went to this office at the end of July to have a cyst removed. I had already seen other doctors who quoted $700 to $800 and labeled the procedure cosmetic. I found this doctor on Zocdoc and was upfront. I said I could not afford that price and asked if there was a way to code the procedure so it would not be cosmetic. The doctor was nonchalant and reassuring. He told me not to worry and said he had me covered. Based on that reassurance, I agreed to move forward. He told me he would be away in August and had me schedule the procedure for early September.
The day before my September appointment, I never received a confirmation. I called the office and was told the doctor was now on medical leave and my appointment was not even on the books. No one had notified me. They rescheduled me with a different doctor for the end of October.
I had the procedure done in October. I was later billed by the lab for something I was explicitly told would not be my responsibility. This was not about a deductible. When I called the finance department, I spoke with Chelsea, who was unhelpful. She explained that the first doctor coded the procedure one way, and the second doctor chose to perform a different procedure entirely. This was never discussed with me. No one told me the plan changed. I consented to one procedure and another was done without explanation.
I escalated to the office manager, Wendy. She accused me of lying and said a doctor would never say what I was told, even though cost was a non starter for me from day one. She later said she would call the lab to try to reduce the bill, then told me nothing could be done since the bill was already issued. She also implied I should be grateful she even made the call. I was never rude, never swore, and did not over contact the office. I was trying to resolve a problem they created.
I had another appointment scheduled for January 20 to remove two additional cysts. I intentionally waited until the new year for deductible reasons. That appointment was canceled without notice. I later learned Chelsea canceled it and never called me to reschedule. I had already rearranged my work schedule to accommodate it.
When I expressed frustration about multiple cancellations, billing surprises, and lack of communication, I was told I was harassing the staff. At that point, I no longer felt I would be treated fairly or receive proper care, so I canceled future appointments.
The doctor who treated me was fine. The overall experience was not. Poor communication. Multiple canceled appointments with no notice. A procedure change without patient discussion. Dismissive billing and management responses. Being blamed as the patient for their internal failures. I would not recommend this office based on the process alone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robin Ann Wilkie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWziagwZDJ56p9I2BXPjut6T4WXVhO7KvvNMWQ4OwoyAI2KqLB5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I live right an around corner of La Jolla Cosmetic Laser clinic and Dermatology.   When I go for my walks, I always passed it and I finally walked in. And it’s so welcoming and the people there are so amazingly helpful. I saw one of the Doctors and it was just wonderful. Very competent they do everything that you need for any kind of Dermatologic procedure that one would need.  I’m looking forward to seeing them again.   Thank you for all your help.  Miss Robin, La Jolla, CA.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0bPS2MEt4tN1l_59JoUnXLIlP0JKfWhqJ8v1Q4SaS4Z-5KogBQuKnR7jHjU94UNSh8hjIPok457UEobqLDMQmgPe86aMJe5f_h854BQLzl6q7DfioDp1ZnZRpu5bVI-m2cCXHqj5ArB-dS=k-no"],"When":"2026-1-14"}]

Also my girls are beautiful!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren Couper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrqARnRlReypKrAl2lyvnanftOwnG_V0dEpV-9bTEvFr37Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Swistun is truly one of the kindest physicians I have ever met. He listened attentively and gave me ample time to ask every single question I had prepared for my consultation. I spent one hour with his medical assistant, Kayla, and two full hours with Dr. Swistun—at no point did I feel rushed or dismissed. He was extremely thorough and explained everything in clear, easy-to-understand medical language.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sophie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIo3E7Ngr8mMAKbjIrY7Uw0Faiht_rkzPqVPodiirviV6VHuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I truly don’t even know where to begin, because words almost don’t feel big enough to describe how grateful I am for Dr. Robert Shumway, Kathy, and the entire team.

This surgery was something I had thought about for so long. It was my biggest insecurity, something that affected how I saw myself, how confident I felt in my body, how clothes fit, and honestly how comfortable I felt just being me. Trusting someone with something so personal and emotional is not easy, but from the very first consultation, Dr. Shumway made me feel completely safe, understood, and confident in my decision.

Dr. Shumway is not just a surgeon, he is a true artist and craftsman. His attention to detail is unreal. He genuinely cares about symmetry, balance, proportion, and creating results that look beautiful, natural, and perfectly tailored to your body. He took the time to explain everything to me thoroughly, answered every question with patience, and never once made me feel rushed or brushed off. I felt heard every step of the way.

The day of my breast augmentation, the care I received was exceptional. The entire team was so attentive, calming, kind, and supportive. They treated me like family. Kathy and the staff checked on me constantly, made sure I was comfortable, reassured me, and truly went above and beyond to make sure I felt safe and taken care of, not just physically, but emotionally too.

And then… the results.

I am honestly still in awe. My results are perfect. Dr. Shumway completely transformed my confidence and how I feel in my own body. For the first time, I look in the mirror and feel aligned with how I’ve always envisioned myself. My posture is different. The way I walk is different. The way I dress is different. I feel feminine, confident, empowered, and finally at home in my body.

The work is stunning, beautifully done, proportionate, and clearly the result of someone who truly loves what they do. You can tell Dr. Shumway puts his heart into his craft. This wasn’t just a procedure, it was life-changing.

What makes this clinic even more special is that the excellence extends beyond surgery. Dr. Shumway and his team also took incredible care of my family member who came in for filler and Botox. The experience was just as thoughtful, professional, and meticulous, and the results were flawless. It speaks volumes about the consistency and integrity of this practice.

Dr. Shumway is without a doubt my surgeon for life. I would trust him with anything. I recommend him and his clinic wholeheartedly and enthusiastically to anyone considering cosmetic surgery or aesthetic treatments. If you are looking for a surgeon who is not only incredibly skilled, but also deeply compassionate, patient, and passionate about delivering the best possible results, this is the place.

I am beyond grateful. Forever thankful. And forever confident thanks to Dr. Robert Shumway and his amazing team. ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VN RD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2LopSj0Hhh15jr7hj5XO_q3tmNWurjpRCJPlEORexn73Y2AvBOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am someone who loves to read reviews before I commit to anything, so for that reason I need to leave a review for anyone that is like me. The team at Dr. Shumway’s office are amazing. Everyone is so caring and make you feel like they have known you forever. I first spoke with Kat & she was so kind & has continues to be very kind and caring through the whole process. The process has been great, the Dr is amazing & his team are just the best. I am so glad I chose Dr.Shumway for my surgery. We don’t even mind driving 2.5 hours. So worth it!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2UGL_Q0AvE11Bc28Ss6vwHMpaj01qTNZ9ysVqQeU3tpNdGOoC_l8PtVk219FJ5cVq-yLELmJyrREou3wcZhoTGOwXPgM2h6fadFGzXkS6TaIl9-f4DnrqBtpgwWoTaGckYtX9rdg=k-no"],"When":"2024-8-20"},{"Name":"Jennifer Eigner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVkovOaELRTNpBrkngghk6yLXPplo382wB9ycDlYCr9La1oA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my 3rd time going to Dr. Shumway and it was just as pleasant as all the others. I've had TUBA breast augmentation, liposuction on multiple areas including flanks, back, chin & jawline, back of arms and mons pubis area. The whole team is incredible, friendly and care deeply about what the patient desires while giving realistic results. Best cosmetic surgery practice in the business ! Thank you Dr. Shumway & Team","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marissa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMDSlJUix5YW6Ah4GXuwgWtZrZKJvXvsCRxQOP1jpJeDVuRKrTFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My mom came here for a treatment and all the staff are amazing! We love Dr. Shumway is so kind. He explains everything in detail and is extremely helpful. The rest of the staff is so friendly and welcoming. I would recommend this team to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zahraa Hameed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsBQAd_ZaXnqgN7D-PX9WyQIZRZmhMnUq4pEQwPVtJzFrvJPk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing experience with Dr. Shumway and his incredible team!

I recently had a TUBA breast augmentation with Dr. Shumway, and I truly can’t say enough good things about the entire journey. From the very first consultation to post-op care, every step was handled with so much professionalism, care, and compassion.

Dr. Shumway took the time to thoroughly explain the TUBA method (transumbilical breast augmentation), which I had honestly never heard much about before. He made sure I understood everything, answered every question with patience, and helped me feel completely confident in my decision. His calm, experienced energy made all the difference. The results are already amazing, and I’m only a few days post-op — I can’t wait to see how they continue to settle. For anyone wondering, TUBA is such a great option — no scars on the breasts at all, and the recovery so far has been smoother than I imagined.

A huge thank you to Cathy, the nurse who cared for me with so much kindness. She went over everything multiple times just to make sure I felt safe and supported. I was nervous the day of surgery, but her warm and attentive energy completely calmed me down. Truly a gem.

This whole team works like a well-oiled machine, but with heart. They made me feel like more than just a patient. The 2 skin tags removal was 270 dollars. I paid in full the day of the appt. and now I just received a text message that I’m being charged another $280 for the an  office visit.

My billing issue was resolved , please be careful and ask what your total bill will be before leaving the office even if paid in full. Frustrating to have to follow up and post a review to get this resolved.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXW8tJamy1UbjAO_QTRMeuXIXsDmzOPrPmz5quPeiSO8FxFQBfn1A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I can only speak to the appointment making process.  However, it was a poor experience.  I used their self-service scheduling feature on their website.  It was not clear to me whether it was limited to medical (versus cosmetic) consultations.  I submitted photographs and paid $165 to do the online consultation.  The provider responded after a couple of days with just a short paragraph saying that this feature was only for medical consultation and to book an appointment by calling them for cosmetic.  Based on my question they said they had 2 procedures available but that they can't definitely recommend either unless I come in.  I spent $165 to get information I already had on their website.  I called in to see if the could apply $165 towards the in person consultation, and they mentioned they don't do that.  I know that part of this is on me (which is why this is a 3 star review and not 1 or 2 star) but the whole process seemed predatory.  They charge $500 to schedule a consultation.  It requires a 2-day business day notice to cancel or reschedule, otherwise you'll lose your money.

For a busy professional that is very inflexible.  I went ahead and scheduled a consultation with a different company who didn't charge $500 upfront, and had a more reasonable cancellation or rescheduling process.  They had a higher 4.9 star average on reviews on Google and provide the same procedures.  After reading through other reviews on here, I'm not surprised there are some people who feel that their prices and they way they handle consultations isn't great.

UPDATE:

After posting this review Lacy called me back from La Jolla Dermatology.  They offered to apply a discount of $165 to the procedure that they would be providing.  It was definitely nice to see follow up.  However, I politely declined.  The $500 deposit for an appointment is too much for me to risk losing.  If I were to need to reschedule within 48 hours, I would lose that automatically.  So I stuck with my appointment with the other provider.  However, it was nice that they followed up and were open to listening to my concerns and offering the discount.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roopa Bansal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVUiPYF-auX0OWhUxUNwUv8dHnEm9VOlyf9UCy1d7n66WzdrhU4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was excited to try this place because a friend recommended them. Unfortunately, the experience was disappointing. They are not transparent with their pricing and seem to use every trick possible to extract more money from you. From tacking on credit card fees to splitting areas of the face in ways that don’t make sense to the average person, the costs quickly add up without clear explanation. It left me feeling more misled than taken care of.","Images":null,"When":""}]

She was very thorough, informative and patient. She listened to all my concerns and answered all questions. She has great bedside manner and I am very appreciative of all her recommendations for my treatment plan. Excellent experience overall!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nasrin “Naz” Gohar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPe3gaRj-Qa-zLMGeYBfAChaJj6L3zlH_g_nfEr8ZLWBMb-N5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Jameson T. Loyal – A Standout in a Field That’s Lost Its Focus

I’ve seen Dr. Loyal twice now, and intentionally waited before writing this—because in the world of cosmetic dermatology, initial impressions can be misleading. Too often, the results don’t hold up once the “fluff” settles. But in this case, I can now say with full confidence: the results are exceptional, and consistent.

I didn’t walk in asking for discounts or package deals—I came in expecting one thing: a result worth the money. That’s hard to find these days. What I got was not only excellent results, but also an experience that felt precise, respectful, and refreshingly professional.

Dr. Loyal listens. He doesn’t rush. He doesn’t chat over your head with his assistant while poking your face like you're not there (a habit I find incredibly disrespectful and sadly common among his peers). Instead, he is fully focused—present in the room—and that shows in the grace and quality of his work. He clearly takes pride in what he does.

I’ve been to many top surgeons, and have tried other clinics for lasers and injectables—but I came back to Dr. Loyal, and I’m glad I did. Now I’m a loyal client—not of the clinic generally, but of Dr. Loyal specifically. He is the reason I return.

The staff is also very professional and kind, which adds to the overall experience. But make no mistake—Dr. Loyal is the real differentiator here. If you’re tired of superficial experiences and you want results backed by real attention to detail, this is your doctor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Robin Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7Fo4mJUZvYoBHyvzQieWzT4URN0lVwIN2Pro5fU5WeM9_8m0r=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment I walked into Restore for my consultation, I just knew this was the place I wanted to do my surgery. Dr. Gallus is absolutely amazing, she's kind, knowledgeable and was helpful from the very beginning. Wonderful bedside manner. The rest of her staff is the best...front desk, billing, nurses, anesthesiologist, etc. With the whole process, I truly felt that they cared about me and wanted to help me gain my surgery objective. Dr Gallus explained everything soooo well, as did the rest of the staff at each part of the procedure.

My favorite was the care taken on the operating table before I went under. I was visible nervous, and the anesthesiologist calmed me with pictures of his puppy, the nurses comforted me, and Dr Gallus held my hand as I went under. One of my favorite parts is my nurse was sitting bedside when I woke up, reassuring me that everything went great and comforting me as I came to. Many times before I've woken up from anesthesia to the staff all buzzing around the operating room, tidying up, etc., leaving me wondering what day it was, where I was, etc. But no, my nurse was right there for me in the recovery room.

And that's all talking about their personalities and actions. Dr Gallus did an amazing job on my actual surgery (explant/lift). So grateful for this team, would highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dottie Goodnight","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6qWbZ0T_FXpyfn1KsySa7WnyUY4kvS8LDKG_4Ojwkr-GhPlw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a tummy tuck & breast reduction/lift to correct asymmetry with Dr. Gallus. Every visit to her office is always so pleasant & comfortable, she truly makes sure her patients are well taken care of. Every single person on her team has always been so kind, too! My skin is genetically prone to keloids and the level of attention & support that has been provided to me to combat my adverse scarring has been nothing short of amazing. I’m so impressed and grateful for the care I’ve received at RestoreSD with Dr. Gallus.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hanna Yi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCopbdOWBfiF6AXGMOG6M5oiHcqjy0kE3tMqs7GMqjQXSuWIhtpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the most amazing and professional experience I’ve ever had at a plastic surgery clinic. Dr. Gallus and her lovely staff were very welcoming and super supportive in my journey.  I had no complications right after surgery even right after going under general anesthesia.  Never felt sick and recovery was very easy and super quick.  She uses both a holistic and conventional method and the experience was top notch from start to finish!  The office is always clean and beautifully decorated and never have I experienced any issues with parking.

I highly recommend Dr. Gallus and wish her and her team much success!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1YXzniWI_qNn2MDIjvDTKe-mnmrGcbvBnFUb2Z8IfTtWb7SvnW_h89q0wm8R2fWikmLeY_uL02zePTH-yrtGtq2_wHHe2gE9z-tgZ7f90wqeYgB4bBzJ_mhJ6o-L1WWNAMhmvD=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2NDD1-IxWsFTZrZTtgB4RyFr8M08Ltvj6_QrIUzI8AySTHecohp3bSSYJquD2abNRyqLo2bqd6UXNflTit6ngweBF37Zuy8o9P-HKrZk8teyuJXBEzrVCAmHCdAcnH0_kBJ8su=k-no"],"When":"2024-12-6"},{"Name":"Victoria Recto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBK3qcymfh7bBXw5FlKUDyT8kIebQKlmW9oGUfjtELfUAknw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love getting my Botox at Restore SD Plastic Surgery esp. from Dr Gallus, she’s awesome! Very knowledgeable and very important to me that she doesn’t upsell!!!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn32nyNt-m-ylNU3AI-AhVerB5RbgmGHDvadIav7kyLoTo9PLUZlIN9PeLyRie60AwUI7BjHfXcVBOJVGkA8KFUemrc3gHzQhxx4PdzKvrVVgjkb5y1NAhkt02UrdO7vsCksAMrPFTM86Os=k-no"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"HairByStacie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXsgQ5KenO3HeGqTUQTr6IIrqDMnZnBoO9EvrEj_pZGV6OcZuo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don't even know where to begin, I had been keeping the fact that I had been in pain and discomfort with one of my breast implants for a few years, from my husband The thought of a third augmentation was terrifying to me. He immediately found the best breast plastic surgeon in California; Dr. Katerina Gallus, Restore SD Plastic Surgery!

From the moment I stepped into this all-female office, AND was seen at my appointment time!!  I was in awe of the attention to detail Dr. Katerina Gallus, and RN Isela gave me. Dr. Gallus is not full of herself, soft spoken, but confident, experienced talented perfectionist.
She did an AMAZING JOB!!

From my take-home package that included pre-surgery vitamins, Chapstick, lips get chapped when we go under, cough drops because your throat can become sore, and arnica for bruising, no male surgeon I have had, including in” La Jolla and Beverly Hills” has ever been so on top of every detail. the tiny details just blew my mind I've had eight surgeries in my life; half were elective body enhancing. So, I am speaking from experience.
The attention to detail that Dr. Gallus and her staff showed me, I can't begin to say how amazed it was. Then after surgery because she had prepared me so well, I woke up I was in no pain I had no pain for 24 hours and I hadn't taken anything but 2000 mg Tylenol morning of surgery I've taken 2 of the opiate pain pills in total, the Valium was the best for me, otherwise I would be cleaning the house. Best recovery medicine is rest and relaxation.
The generosity with the compression garments, mind blowing, some doctors have you purchase them. (TO BAD THEY MUST GO NAMELESS LOL) Not only did she supply them she gave extra!! And the foam pieces for EXTRA COMPRESSOIN on Lipo area; BRILIANT! The speed at which I am recovering is astonishing, this Dr. needs to be a teaching her methods to all surgeons!! I have told all my female clients about Dr. Gallus and her staff!

I had been walking around feeling deformed since 2002, because a previous liposuction on my belly that was so deep it was like a Ditch running from hip to hip. And my breast augmentation from the same Dr. (Beverly Hills), mentioned to me after surgery that he made them bigger than we discussed!? WTF.
Dr. Gallus and I decided to go a little smaller, and she suggested a slight nipple raise.
I was little nervous of possible sensation lose, but already have full sensation.
They are the breasts I always wanted, the slight nipple raise makes 100% difference! I LOVE MY BREAST NOW; I am so happy I don't feel like my stomach is deformed anymore. I'm 63 and I finally feel comfortable in my body. My body is perfect to me!!!
THANK YOU SO MUCH Dr. Gallus and your EXCEPTIONAL STAFF!
Huge shout out to nurse Isela, for her kindness and extensive time she spent with me! Ava, such a cutie immediate response to my calls, and emails. Beautiful Bri and her amazing hair, so sweet and attentive. And last but in no way least, the compassionate, reassuring, and charming Dr. Ibrahim anesthesiologist (a male pleasant surprise). You all made this experience Unforgettable!!
Sincerely, Stacie Davis
I almost forgot the most important part of this experience 5 to 6 weeks out of my surgery she's doing laser on any scars to make them invisible that should have been at the very top of my review but this woman is amazing anyone is thinking about redoing or having your breast augmentation done this is the only woman to do it trust me! ❤️‍🩹💝","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Taylor May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIalDmGcYJgEwm7e83V2Ot34O26o7vD5aE-6CvhffLS6rArqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Restore SD. Dr. Gallus is absolutely wonderful and made the process seamless from start to finish. Her resume speaks for itself! From the first consultation, I knew what to expect, and when, with the process of my procedure and after-care clearly explained, and all my questions answered. The process was very collaborative and she treated me with respect, honesty, and set clear expectations. I am very happy with my results, and would absolutely recommend her to anyone inquiring. The Restore SD facilities are accessible, clean, organized, and I can’t say enough great things about the entire staff. Ava is so professional and considerate and was amazing at meeting my scheduling requests from day one, as well as answering all my financing questions. Bri is one of one. She is knowledgeable, respectful, nonjudgmental, empowering, and she makes you feel so comfortable at every encounter. It would be hard to find a team that works together with a better rapport than Bri and Dr. G!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Griselda Velazquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0_fyvcUnYImBXutqNR7KRuMrA78vcm_o3yFD53u0daMOKZmSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Danielle did a really good job with my service. Would recommend you to check them out for other services aswell.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2LaX4j2z0uNWYjrqLl5Q42b32acYIqqB6XJ2LW95zJYBWgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Gallus at Restore SD is amazing!! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lynn Fishman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcbxt98o9pr3BP1NBwZZOgDmjiShsaL-ZDcIK6io4s3AwSxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was diagnosed with stage 1 breast cancer in 2020.
My initial treatment was a lumpectomy and 30 radiation sessions.  Unfortunately some unforeseen complications developed and I ended up with a 4 year journey, involving 9 surgeries.

I was initially referred to Dr. Pacella by a close friend who had reconstructive surgery by him for a double mastectomy due to breast cancer.  Her end results were amazing.

I liked Dr. Pacella from day one.  He has such a calming presence, is patient, and explains everything in detail. Sometimes even drawing pictures to better demonstrate, so he thought.  The truth is they made me giggle, because I can assure you his artistic skills are no measure of his surgical skills!

Dr. Pacella and his absolutely wonderful nursing staff and clinical staff are outstanding.  Over the 4 years I spent under his care, I was treated with such kindness, compassion, and respect.  I actually looked forward to seeing my “ friends” at his office during my many, many visits. Lots of hugs and even laughter!

I had my final surgery in January 2024. Last steps of reconstruction.
With each step and each surgery
Dr. Pacella would spend whatever time I needed, patiently reiterating each procedure and what to expect.

Today, I am fully recovered, back to my workouts and work.  Of course I have some scars. My battle scars.
Or badass scars as my kids love to say! But my breasts are again looking good, normal and full, which is what I had hoped for as a final result.

I am so appreciative of the
kindness and incredible skill of Dr. Pacella.  He may not be the best artist on paper, but he surely is an artistic and incredibly skilled surgeon in real life!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily McCrory","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISOXjERvv2NTf4h-AXfXNwzvAGxxmU5j8iuhehUlIaf0GKAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely wonderful experience with Dr. Pacella and his entire team for my rhinoplasty. From the very first consultation, Dr. Pacella made me feel heard, understood, and completely at ease. He took the time to carefully explain the procedure, answer all of my questions, and set realistic expectations. I truly appreciated how attentive and detail-oriented he was throughout the entire process.

On the day of surgery, his team was warm, professional, and incredibly supportive. They made what could have been a nerve-wracking experience feel smooth and reassuring. Every staff member I interacted with was kind, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring.

The results have exceeded my expectations. My nose looks natural and perfectly balanced with my facial features—exactly what I was hoping for. The recovery process was also easier than I anticipated, thanks to the clear post-op instructions and consistent follow-up from the office.

I am beyond grateful to Dr. Pacella and his team for their skill, professionalism, and compassion. I highly recommend them to anyone considering a rhinoplasty—you’ll be in excellent hands!

Attached are my healed results with no makeup 3 years later and pre-op 2022.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3LM7Z5D0-EFEvJYjZUoe_1q29-0_1GAnbjzZQJD8ow6wwJNYzTmf0Ootx2HS9Q_PxLFrHVQ-31OdOKoXPSTZeRrPzMsmN6cR08VsQtBC-ig-lnZ-17aCqdN1PTVnxV_bG-uJ0N0ueH9m4L=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1BvJCMXrI1R5Tt66GnxVKTbMmWjcOakCOJxUd53jY-1BCKXl7tZQr-dqM88PpGrHZEnteciLcQeGyLehILjR3ZFYTzG3-SZbPWlzMHzRBt-AGeZiTI-2aup6ar1_B-sL51w1SfWf59V5Hu=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn16dfXvehgaz-2sJG9gq7bgmbP80D0zQWv6AZbYN6L3ndJ2MRDHcWDk1OueVM_GsybweKFA3-vq6DBv41MqDBWSbR7pyjrGtHp_SQjF4gzC7J1Ee51RjgSBY4q7orM3skGorJ7ftNiHHDbc=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn022nDoH4_dDydwFpueUUXhLL-YjwSLGWgbA9a6U8wJd7KwbKT_qXYGoU69kbMwVz3K6KhVkfruSzmKbtwiuQjkWxNf4SnzzEJjM7zwntyXVgnubEMOUjmyHqm8q1L8OnVKLIII_7eefI6p=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1Z_mx9-s2GDbWH4lq3752LNVGDmje46pkH7XYtcXDIboD0eYlEbtOnY1oojWt_UiG1B4XqkuI5I9Nw-bbcXojy_kEwy9vg3fTrHrgyn15QQlTHkpnX7xzOF38J3KCQwGQeqJFvCRIvyho=k-no"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Patti Crosier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQQnfbcsyccgzPA4ZfOvXJAFnPba0rqvwqvxEf3SbE6jhLdMk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Pacella was a big part of my breast cancer journey. The procedure itself went well too. I had numbing cream on for about 30 minutes before the laser treatment, so I felt only a minimal pinch. [{"Name":"Chelle Romanoff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWy0gTUiIrWZ9i8NLvQfDuWw4BkNXPmboyalJZhn_kBVMsrSsT_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my breast augmentation with Dr. Alavi back in September, and I truly couldn’t be happier with my experience. From my very first consultation to my final follow-up, he and his staff were incredibly kind, caring, and efficient. They made me feel comfortable and supported every step of the way.

Dr. Alavi takes his time with his patients and never makes you feel rushed. He listened carefully to what I wanted, answered all of my questions thoroughly, and was very understanding throughout the entire process. I felt completely confident that I was in great hands.

My surgery went perfectly, and my recovery was smooth and much easier than I expected. The results are absolutely beautiful — exactly what I was hoping for. My scarring is minimal, and everything looks very natural and balanced.

Dr. Alavi is truly exceptional at what he does. I’m so grateful for his skill and care, and I would highly recommend him to anyone considering this surgery!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Trevellyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUq9_ayoMgPwKIrAvZK6EKZF31xUqQs_02WpgGATDUvJf99GrdK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In 2025 I decided to address my sagging jowls and neckline and consulted several physicians. It wasn’t until I met Dr. Sassan Alavi that I felt confident I’d found the right surgeon. I was nervous about the procedure, but Dr. Alavi’s exceptional bedside manner and calm confidence—backed by his experience performing thousands of facelifts—put me at ease. He took the time to explain exactly how he would perform my facelift, what results to expect, and answered every question thoroughly. From that moment I knew I was in excellent hands.

On the day of surgery I was still anxious, but his nurse anesthetist treated me with warmth and reassurance. Everything went according to plan. Postoperative pain was minimal, as he had promised, and after a few days I was managing comfortably with over‑the‑counter medication.

Each follow‑up visit with Dr. Alavi was excellent; his staff welcomed me like family. He reminded me I was healing beautifully because I followed his recovery instructions carefully. I am deeply grateful to Dr. Alavi—he is kind, compassionate, and exceptionally skilled. I’m absolutely thrilled with my results: no one can tell I had a facelift; I simply look 10–15 years younger.  If you are thinking about getting plastic surgery of any kind, go see Dr. Alavi.  He answers all your questions and thoroughly explains how he will perform the procedure.  I cannot say enough good things about Dr. Alavi.  He is an exceptional doctor and a gift to the profession.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deirdre Sullivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-sMWAJsRj5TgjgoeFmeKdS8jwGOc0zw6U-Xbd8WgZX6K_wvTy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Alavi is an extraordinarily talented cosmetic surgeon who possesses a keen artistic eye. Not only is he a superb physician, but Dr. Alavi's stellar staff are the most kind and welcoming people you would ever want to meet. The entire center is supportive both before and after any procedure you choose with them. He is a very kind person who truly wants what's best for you. His team is exemplary too. They pay attention to the small details and always have amazing attitudes. The team is very informative and super communicative, which is what you want. Their team and Jaina, in particular, has always went above and beyond of what is needed and they deserve amazing praise. They don't try to oversell you and only recommend what they think is best for you.
After consulting with many dermatologist, I finally found my way to his office. He and his team have been able to achieve what I've been wanting. I've been regularly getting scar treatment and I feel better every time I come out of this place.
I highly recommend this place if you ever need anything within this realm of medicine.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLC9ejTnRcXAdWbyURONm6mgTmkzZ0ezXTBYewpX43QnVL6Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a revision rhinoplasty with Dr. Kolstad and could not be happier with the result. I am +8 months post-surgery and my nose looks amazing. Dr. Kolstad not only focused on perfecting the aesthetics of my nose, but also drastically improved the functionality of my breathing. My nose looks better AND I can finally breathe better. Everything from my initial consult, the surgery itself and all follow-up appointments went so smoothly. Also, Dr. Kolstad is personally available for any questions/concerns post-surgery and even responded on weekends when I had a question/concern. What I appreciated most about Dr. Kolstad is that he is a perfectionist and you can really tell he takes a lot of pride in what he does. On the same token, he is not afraid to tell you that your expectations for surgery are realistic vs. unrealistic, which not all surgeons will do, but it is so necessary. His results truly speak for themselves... Thank you so very much Dr. Kolstad and team for helping me feel and look like my best self!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsay chester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuXDpJ53_KFpIq60RtgFlToYrYtqujQRvuCVPtMd6y41C_sSnP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kolstad has such a strong attention to detail and truly listens to what you want. He makes sure you feel comfortable and cared for throughout the entire process. His professionalism and calm demeanor really put me at ease, and I trust his expertise completely. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha Carotenuto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5DVLeNTSWC5ae4hU8_mb2_oQvRGavyDnbFQT5HclZktHo2E9b2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been seeing Dr. Kolstad for my injections for a few years now and he is the only doctor I trust with my treatments. He has a conservative approach and is always candid with me, which I appreciate. It’s evident he cares very much about his work.

I’ve been to many different injectors in the past (in many different states) and I’ve never had more natural looking results. His staff are also all so lovely and helpful with scheduling appointments and making you feel comfortable. I highly recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dr. Hailey Cohon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY8YbCyJQmy6R_AZjuuocJ8LadRTHsMUD117LwGqrU26C7Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kolstad and his staff are incredible! I have gone to him twice now for lip injections. By far the best results I've gotten throughout my last few years of receiving injections. I have extremely thin lips and he offers a great technique that creates a natural look and doesn't cause migration (a problem I've faced in the past with other providers). The staff is so kind and welcoming too! Truly a great environment. I highly recommend Dr. Kolstad if you are looking for an experienced and skilled injector!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaga Glassman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHGHf4cLPSXrv3szcFaG4dxVbhE84EUcOqarCWcSots83YdCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kolstad’s office is always so warm and friendly! I trust him enough to simply ask what he would recommend and he never disappoints!
Most importantly he works with you! As an actress I always have to look my best, but I like a very natural look and need to maintain my full expressive personality! So, I count on him to artistically add just the right of filler which I combine with products that I love that tighten and give your skin a nice glow","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ally Leffel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIeNBWwQju1cjsSK3PTdST46V8CbLD0eG-FUHRFSq2NbXN-Zw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Only have great reviews for this practice! Dr Kolstad is knowledgeable, trustworthy, kind, compassionate, and creates a safe and understanding environment both for patients and his employees. Every employee involved in the practice is welcoming, kind, and ensures your comfort. Dr. Kolstad’s work is executed beautifully and has kept me returning for years and now even from out of town. I cannot recommend him enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sierra Larkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN1kaJEd2cA_o58-dqY93WlkqCYnua91rMoDOpQUJFzL-VxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love Dr. Kolstads office! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Val","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKh6gmEsXQ42TvENpu8Ato8wkTe2AQABV8DDegspb3LxFC9zA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Alexander is an exceptionally skilled surgeon and one of the most caring and personable physicians I have ever met.  I am in my mid-60s and one month ago I had multiple procedures.  During my initial consultation, Dr. Alexander explained clearly how a face ages and how each procedure he recommended would reverse those effects.  During my pre-op, he and his caring and talented staff explained very clearly how to prepare for the surgery and what to expect during the recovery period, so there were no surprises.  Dr. Alexander scheduled me for several post-op appointments during the first week and regular ones during the following month.  At my appointments, he anticipated all possible concerns and completely reassured me.  One month after surgery, the results are already stunning.  I look 15 to 20 years younger.
