Unfortunately, it’s hard to navigate through so many choices in doctors & the sad thing is that most of your options will provide you less than stellar results. Dr P was the first plastic surgeon I ever went to & I assumed they were all awesome like him. I was wrong & had to go back to him to have him correct surgeries by other well known doctors. These were doctors with great (prob paid for) reviews on Real Self. Don’t waste your time & money with the others! Go straight to Dr P. I write this review for no other reason than to help others. Dr Pietraszek’s work is superior to most of the surgeons out there!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janice Grimaldi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVkikIE7cH6htn6w61mTbtnIB1ABtw3B-U7CMNZL2WYbcyCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After four years of consults with surgeons in Michigan and California, I chose Dr. P's office in San Diego for my face and neck lift.

Initially, I worked over the phone and email with Tracey setting up the consult.  She was quick to respond to my questions and followed thru on what needed to be done.  She was very "real" and unpretentious.  We worked well together and this set the "tone" for my visit.

Flying out from Michigan, Dr. P was the last surgeon I was interviewing in La Jolla.  Upon arrival,  I was seated in a small room and was told Dr. P was running a few minutes late.  When he came in, the first thing he did was "apologize" for making me wait!  Since when do physicians apologize for "running late"?  I almost fell out of my chair!  I think the wait was minimal, like 5 minutes.

He wheeled his stool so we were close and eye level.  He started touching my face and neck saying "my skin has good elasticity".  He then felt along my jaw line stating "you have good bone structure".  Of all my other consults, not one surgeon touched me.  This was a "WOW" moment!

After our visit was done, Dr. P left and spoke with Tracey.  Minutes later, I was walking out with a quotation packet. After careful deliberation,  I called Dr. P's office and a surgical date was set.

Day of surgery, I was able to decline the offer of something to calm me.  I was not fearful or anxious.  In recovery, I remember kind voices and gentle touches.  I went home with my family care givers and returned the next day so my surgical head dressing could be changed.

Because I am 67, this surgery was hard on me. During my recovery, the "Emotional and Physical Reactions" sheet provided by Dr. P was/is extremely helpful during my recovery.   I don't know how many times I have read it, but each time it helps me understand what I am experiencing is normal.

I have felt better every day and have meticulously followed the post op instructions.  This Friday, at 3 weeks post surgery, I can begin resuming my normal activities.  I can't wait to go outside without a scarf wrapped around my neck and jaw!!!   But, best of all, now when I look in the mirror "I see me". Thank you all so much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheri Adams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-xuxhQHPem3wyPWZti8hkJoGvwXGrw58_PDNK0RyyrdPmmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot thank Dr Pietrazek and his whole team enough. I went to him looking into a breast augmentation and lift. That was a few years ago. Finally the time was right. But, I had different plans now. I wanted a tummy tuck too! I spoke with Dr Pietrazek at my consultation and he advised against doing both at the same time because it would be too risky to be under that long. So I decided to go with the tummy tuck first since the recovery is longer. Then a month later I will go back for my breasts. I am now 4dpo from my tummy tuck and I couldn't be happier! I honestly thought that if he could just cut off my excess skin and make me look "better" I would be happy. Dr Pietrazek Kept telling me "I think you will be so  pleased....so happy. Don't worry" again, all I wanted was the extra skin gone. When I walked into the surgery center, I was nervous. He explained EVERYTHING to me. The anesthesiologist also explained exactly what was going to happen and how I would feel. And the nurse! She too was so caring understanding and sweet! My last request was "please make sure I come back!" I'm happy to say my surgery went flawless. My pain has been very well controlled and everyone called that night to make sure I was ok. Including the anesthesiologist. The next day, I went in for post op Everything was fine! That was Saturday. Yesterday (Monday 3dpo) I went in for a bandage change. When he took off the bandages, I cried! Not because I wasn't happy, but because I was ecstatic! For the first time in a long time, I loved my self! Dr Pietrazek and his team has definitely changed my life. He is a true artist! I still need to go back to get my breasts done and I cannot wait! I will say, my breasts are what I originally planned to have done. But if for some reason I was told I can't get them done. I would be OK with that. Why?? Because Dr Pietrazek did such an amazing job on my tummy I would be happy with just that. I love my new body! I will definitely recommend Dr Pietrazek and his team to anyone in need of perfection. I really am excited to continue my journey with him!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"michele shepherd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWy2luz2R-evqL0l5Fz2-RMgX3IuJdyaxyhd4EC4GgCe6UE2ec=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Charles was my surgeon when I was 25-45-and again at 55. Loved","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"roxanne beheshti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIokL5xzbeatgO3lMQpbb3ezZ3UQxSJzmwmGNJwYtSaH7fpgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing this not only out of personal necessity but also as a warning to others. I underwent a breast reduction procedure performed by Dr. Jeffrey Umansky. When I expressed immediate and legitimate concerns about the grossly asymmetrical, misshapen outcome, I was dismissively met with the condescending remark: “Let’s remember, they’re sisters, not twins.” This patronizing statement was clearly meant to deflect responsibility and silence a vulnerable, young patient who had just trusted him with her body. The result was not only physically disfiguring, but emotionally devastating.

At the time, I lacked the personal and emotional support to pursue legal recourse. However, with time and reflection, it’s become undeniably clear: I was negligently and carelessly operated on, and the trauma I endured has left lasting scars—both literally and psychologically.

To be specific, Dr. Umansky’s surgical execution resulted in:

Sloppy and uneven internal tissue excision
Poorly closed incisions, resulting in significant scarring and dog-ear deformities
Asymmetrical areolas, with nipples more than an inch off from one another
Long-term disfigurement that has made any corrective procedures extremely complex and costly
Despite my desperation and embarrassment, I reached out to the office manager shortly after the surgery to request even a partial refund so I could afford reconstructive work elsewhere. My plea was coldly denied and ultimately ignored. The lack of professional accountability shown by both Dr. Umansky and his office was reprehensible.

Since then, I have consulted with multiple board-certified plastic surgeons, all of whom confirmed the extensive damage done and emphasized the difficulty of now restoring what was once a healthy, intact chest. One even stated that the tissue had been “butchered”—their words, not mine.

I have photographic documentation of both the immediate post-op results and my current condition, which I am prepared to share publicly and with appropriate legal channels if necessary. If the platform allowed, I would upload these images in full to give others the visual proof of what I have suffered due to Dr. Umansky’s substandard care.

Dr. Umansky, whether your staff chose to shield you from the fallout or not, you should know: your conduct was not only negligent but borders on medical malpractice. Your failure to take responsibility—medically or financially—for the irreversible damage you caused is inexcusable. I gave everything I had to pay for that surgery, and in return, I was left physically distorted and emotionally broken.

This message is for the patients who have been silenced, dismissed, or gaslit into thinking they had no right to speak up. I speak now because I have found my voice—and others deserve to find theirs too. Your actions, Dr. Umansky, were not only unprofessional and unethical—they were, and remain, absolutely unforgivable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"m kay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgz4dyIu3087KMmPa98OcuAFRNF26KBriNdutNPyLFaqZnLpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. William Umansky did phenomenal work on my nose job. He is an exceptional surgeon with an outstanding team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Skyler Finnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVprgJKgFFXQ6-8iG8YrALhKRz-k2X_q30N-dgaPHFMhq_3wxSo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I want to take a minute to review my experience at Miller Cosmetics, although I could go on all day... What a first class experience from start to finish!!

After being greeted by the friendly faces at the front desk-Amy, Betsi, and Katie--I was guided to my lovely patient suite.
I was then briefed and prepped for surgery by nurse Madi, who was not only absolutely gorgeous but also incredibly professional. She calmed my nerves right away and made me feel completely taken care of. Next came Blanca, the scrub tech, who prepared the tools and setup for the procedure with the most soothing presence, putting me even more at ease as I melted into my recliner. Surrounded by such beautiful, caring, and capable nurses, I knew I was in great hands.

Then entered Dr. Scott Miller, who not only met but exceeded my expectations. He carried out my surgery with precision, skill, and genuine care--chatting with me the entire time with his playful humor that nearly made me forget I was even having surgery! Just as I was getting settled in, he was already wrapping up, and before I knew it, I was on my way.

Sure I was a little sore in my recovery post op, but nurse Madi was there every step of the way to check in on me, advise me on recovery tips and tricks, removed sutures, and scheduled my follow up appointment with Dr. Miller to ensure a full recovery.

I'm beyond grateful to the entire team at Miller Cosmetics and can't recommend them highly enough. Every single person there went above and beyond to make the experience so comfortable and positive. If you're considering any form or function cosmetic procedure, do yourself a favor and book a consultation today!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alissa Crowley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuNeNVT9Da6pbTSw16twDNmvQzv5kn30L66OuMhfzcZQws2GSk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Scott Miller is truly one of a kind when it comes to the plastic surgery industry! [{"Name":"Dina Lombardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5WsOPmFrgkDN5SgO3trJDP81U6L0o8AO31u1QJyyOoFiCSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing!!! If I could give Dr.Brucker 10 stars I would!! From the first consultation all the way through my preop appointments and then my surgery and post op, everything was stellar. Dr Brucker is extremely knowledgeable, experienced, and kind, all with a great bedside manner. I never felt rushed and he really takes the time to explain everything and listens to your concerns. His aesthetic ability is top notch. I needed a breast revision due to capsular contracture, animation deformity, and bilateral ruptured implants. My previous surgeon had retired, so I had to start from scratch and find a new surgeon. After several consultations with various surgeons and research, as soon as I met Dr. Brucker there was no question he was the right surgeon.  And being a registered nurse myself, I will tell you that l am extremely particular.
He fixed everything and the results are incredible. I woke up the very first day without the long time chronic pain I was experiencing from the contracture and ruptures. Not to mention, they look awesome!
And, his nurse Jen, is spectacular!!
She is also extremely knowledgeable and makes you feel comfortable every step of the way. She went above and beyond to answer my questions and make sure I had the appropriate medications for after my surgery. Tricia, his surgical coordinator, is super responsive and communicated all the necessary pre op information and got answers to any questions I had before and after surgery. The office staff are always welcoming and friendly.
I am still healing, but I can confidently 100% recommend Dr. Brucker Plastic Surgery!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heather Bishara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJptR7sB9raGFfR4V7-5txiv4qMlEmZyquXYPVhzAllrQ6Jag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a breast reduction with free nipple graft done by Dr. Brucker and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From my first consultation, Dr. Brucker truly listened me and took my wants and needs seriously. He explained that a nipple graft would be necessary for me to reach my desired goal of going from a size DD/E to a B/C and addressed all my concerns and questions about the more invasive procedure with friendly professionalism. He showed so much empathy, making me feel comfortable and reassured throughout the entire process. His staff was equally amazing—nurse Jen, in particular, was so attentive and knowledgeable.

Dr. Brucker's office is well-run and I was always seen on time, with appointments being quick but thorough. He approaches his procedures with an artistic, designers eye and his surgical skills are exceptional; not only did the procedure go smoothly, but I’ve regained sensation in my nipples which I wasn’t sure would happen. The results truly exceeded my expectations and I’m incredibly grateful for the care and expertise provided by Dr. Brucker and his team. Very highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"trichelle Gregory","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbo-uuoP0nY7ioe_jSygoXQ_WX_xLVLSBTfM1OTp9pLwL_-OU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn't be more happy with my results!!! I interviewed eight different surgeons before I finally made the decision to move forward with my procedure. I had a breast reduction, lift and a tummy tuck. I am 8 weeks post surgery and I am thrilled with everything from start to finish! Dr. Brucker is amazing along with his entire team. Nurse Jen was the best and was so helpful with all my questions, a true professional! I felt very comfortable with Dr. Brucker he took the time to explain everything and he answered all my questions without rushing me. He was informative in his communication as to what I could expect my results to be and the recovery process of the surgery. I felt well taken care of by everyone, Dr. Brucker, Nurse Jen, Tricia(office Manager) the anesthesiologists and the entire office staff. I highly recommend this team for your cosmetic needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"evelyn manville","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiFn35QI_ra2gw-Z7VG7UHB0ueqkFwl21IPuP8-e1HDil6kQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met with 3 other doctors before I met Dr. Brucker.

Dr. Brucker and his staff are extremely knowledgeable and very kind.
It’s been a week  since my surgery, and I am SO happy with the results.

I had some questions after our first visit and he was patient and informative in the second putting my concerns at rest.  However, the result was totally underwhelming and I did not look any different than before the surgery. Dr. Brucker is a nice person but he is way too conservative.  I spent almost $20K for nothing. If you actually want to have a definite improvement after surgery, do not go to Dr. Brucker.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"BClark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUH_X730jfl1McNFYyixGci_YT0F4FJG-vEY7jKmhjl5hlLCtaI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Brucker is an excellent plastic surgeon. His office staff are very accommodating and knowledgeable. Dr Brucker performed eyelid surgery on me. I am thrilled with the results. No more droopy eyelids. He is concerned with his patients healing properly and scheduled regular follow up visits. I would recommend him highly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erica Loring","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfEijHTtdTu-ZgTmyupVs3VKevnrSKObkJfz8U8XsNvzNExgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Dr. Brucker after I was very unhappy and insecure about a past breast augmentation. Let me first start out by saying, I don’t particularly like or trust many doctors after having many poor experiences with them. So I was really nervous to take another risk. He listened to my concerns, voiced his opinions and gave me breasts I actually love. His bedside manners are fantastic, I enjoy talking to him and feel heard. His skill level was SO far better than my previous troll of a surgeon. He does internal stitches that you don’t see, so there are no scars where the holes are from the stitches. I got the shape and size I wanted. While under I also opted for some light lipo on the abdomen, from a past experience trying out cool sculpting (don’t do that), I had scar tissue on my abs! So after surgery, when I healed, I had pretty significant “bumps”. Dr. Bruckner has gone above and beyond and has me come in like 6 more times to do one more pass of lipo free of charge,  to try to fix that area as much as possible, and when it became clear that it was scar tissue that wasn’t budging, he’s done teeny tiny shots of steroids to break it down and it completely worked. All at no more cost! He was so focused on having me feel good about my body. Very much appreciated and I have told everyone I know if they are considering any plastic surgery to please come here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elise Burd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkGQnXve0nrsBCcqVjcswtp6ahbgfZ6bWBVGRgKZUSQ_IQr8M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Brucker and his staff are amazing!  Everyone is extremely professional and inviting.  Most importantly Dr. Brucker is as close to perfect in his field as much as humanly perfect is possible.  My case was a complicated one not just your typical surgery.  We had many questions with various end results depending on how things were handled.  I had a bad experience with another surgeon years ago this was a direct result of his bad decision which I needed to find a plastic surgeon who could successfully repair the wrong that was done...if it was even possible. I went to 2 plastic surgeons prior to finding out about Dr. Brucker.  The first I was more then unimpressed the second was Dr. Scott Miller who was amazing and I much respect for him since he felt he was not the best surgeon for my needs.  Dr. Miller took the time to call on Dr. Brucker, they discussed my case and Dr. Miller suggested I have Dr. Brucker handle my surgery needs.  Think about this for a moment....both Dr. Miller and Dr. Brucker took a concern for my case on their own time , it wasn't about the money it was about the patient.  Much respect to both.  When I met with Dr. Brucker my boyfriend was with me who had also done research.  Dr. Brucker explained how he felt it would be best to handle my needs, he explained the process in full detail.  He listened to my boyfriend's concerns as well as mine of course and readjusted his thoughts based on my lifestyle and seeing my muscle structure.  There was no rush during our consultation, he was physical and mentally present the entire time which was well over an hour.  I was of course nervous, concerned, anxious and scared as to be expected.  With this said, I fully had trust and faith in Dr. Brucker and his staff that they would make the necessary decisions during my surgery with my physical and mental health as top priority.  The surgery went beautifully, they had some surprises along the way but they held true to what they do best.  If you are considering ANY plastic surgery, especially any reconstructive needs Dr. Brucker is the doctor you must see without hesitate.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ethan W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3Y65kXCGwt8xBWX0LogmTsmzGeeje9YnplGBnZdnfMz3NTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From my very first consultation through financing and all the way to surgery, this office has been absolutely amazing. Every step of the process was explained clearly, and I was given ample time and opportunity to ask questions. The entire team showed genuine kindness, patience, and compassion, which made a potentially overwhelming experience feel calm and reassuring.

They handled all paperwork and appointments quickly and efficiently, and the payment process was simple and stress-free. On surgery day, everything was clean, organized, professional, and fully prepared. I was even provided with my compression garments for post-surgery care, which was one less thing to worry about.

I had a follow-up visit the very next day, and Dr. Rodriguez never once made me feel rushed or pressured. Every question I had — before and after surgery — was taken seriously. Messages and emails were answered the same day, and I always felt supported and informed about what to expect during recovery.

I am absolutely ecstatic about my results. I went in with a “mommy pooch” and came out with a body better than I had in my 20s. I’m almost 50 and truly never thought I could look this good again. I had a tummy tuck, breast lift with augmentation, and fat transfer to my lips and under my eyes to restore the fullness I had lost — and the results exceeded my expectations.

I genuinely could not have been in better hands. Thank you to Dr. Rodriguez and the entire team for guiding me through this journey with such care and professionalism. [{"Name":"Reagan Tesoro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq_rL6O1ogwOVzh4d58X1-baWLRN_MkJ6CBiHPkE9SKL88umc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Bevins and the staff at Pacific Lipo were very approachable, supportive, and genuinely caring throughout the process. They answered all my questions and follow up care were seamless. I'm still in my early stages of recovery  and I can already see positive results. Each of my visits thus far are all positives and I'm looking forwards to continued improvements.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nick P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXCtsk78KSvlASpQnYPKrBloxOi6FKAiW_GGLeP8JYqZz-Fc5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t typically leave negative reviews, but I feel obligated to share my experience to help others make informed decisions.

I paid approximately $5,000 for chin liposuction and scar revision with Dr. Joseph Bivens at Pacific Liposuction. Unfortunately, 6 months post-procedure, the results did not match what was represented:
1) The chin contour shows no visible improvement from pre-procedure to post-procedure (documented with photos)
2) The scar revision resulted in irregular scarring
3) A postoperative suture was missed during removal and remained embedded for weeks, healing into the skin and contributing to the irregularity

I understand that complications can happen in any medical procedure - what matters most is how a practice responds when they do.

When I raised these concerns during follow-up, the surgeon initially offered to perform a complimentary revision, acknowledging the outcome was not what we’d hoped for. However, after I inquired about potentially seeing a different surgeon within the practice, the entire offer was withdrawn and I was told to seek care elsewhere.

The most disappointing aspect was the communication breakdown. What felt like a productive, even friendly conversation (we were laughing together during the appointment) was later characterized by the practice as “confrontational.” The practice ultimately declined to provide any corrective care and has not responded to my request for financial accommodation.

I’m now seeking corrective care elsewhere at additional cost to address both the original concerns and complications from the retained suture.

I would strongly recommend finding a different practice. When complications arise or results don’t meet expectations, you want a surgeon and team who will work with you to make it right - not one that will withdraw care and leave you to deal with it on your own.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

****12/29/25 Update: they are now responding to my comment saying that I wasn’t treated here when I have the receipts showing that I was treated at this location","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jimmy Galarraga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJI6ZJRKtyAjPSgFtau4PRsU-51EMHzToWFKgLAsW6n3IJY0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire staff is exceptionally friendly and professional. From the initial consultation through post-operative care, they consistently showed genuine care and made sure I felt supported every step of the way. Dr. Guttikonda took the time to thoroughly explain each stage of the procedure, making sure I was informed and comfortable throughout the process. I highly recommend Pacific Lipo—thank you for everything you do!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jonita Outerbridge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxxvg8AW9rKJEq2uHwi2tI3V9DthuG-K4-hK3hIV3N0_SoOPgBrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From consultation through aftercare, the staff has been impeccable. Dr. Bivens was patient and thorough, taking time to answer all of my questions, listen to my concerns, and understand the results I hoped for. Jessica, who provides the post-op massages, is wonderful and very detail oriented. She often noticed things and brought them to the staff’s attention, which they addressed right away.

The team stayed in close contact, sending text updates and replying quickly whenever I had questions, which made me feel supported throughout the entire process. My procedure was six months ago, and I have learned that healing looks different for everyone. In my case, I still have some minor pain and swelling in certain areas, but I noticed a better shape immediately, I actually have a figure, and it continues to improve. I plan to update my review once my healing is complete. Overall, I am very happy that I chose Dr. Bivens","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeVpzv_5HEtjDSigCEkskJwmP7VfuSPOtQoQz4oFK30JIaiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"4 Years later and I am still deformed looking because of this clinic.  My body was fine beforehand. I had a flat butt and a little stomach,  something I could have easily fixed at the gym. I trusted that Dr. Bivens would give me the dream body I have always wanted. Instead I got left with hard ball on one buttcheek that left it looking like a triangle. They do not look symmetrical whatsoever and im more insecure than ever. For 4ish years I have been hiding my butt with baggy clothes. I can no longer dress the way I used to or want to because of how TERRIBLE it looks.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ari Quag","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7cAHzJNJpU9MNU53LZnT4mbZwdU4YPRelNj92cOEMaz0d8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All the staff that work here are great with customer service before and after care. I notice these people leaving 1 star reviews either came with botched surgeries from Mexico, or give everyone one star reviews from the looks of their reviews for other businesses. Just sound like a bunch of angry negative people. I think it's important that you do consult with multiple doctors prior to picking your surgeon. And seeing their work what they're capable of. Dr G is pretty honest and up front with what he can and can't do. That's what sold me, compared to other doctors trying to upsell things that they could not accomplish. Numbed me very well , and was very sweet and nice . My dermatologist did an amazing job. One session in , 7 days out, and I’ve seen results already. My hair is just now starting to grow back (2 months out ). As someone who’s gotten painful abscesses and could never shave my entire life (maybe once a month at best with no pain) I can saw their lasers really work. Pleasant experiences ! Second session now","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angie Koo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAKd3wBRUX5Ke5tVrbL2SXhMXqAB6tlZeYwzaZ7e4sRzz-QT8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This office is a scam. I called to ask to book a consultation for laser treatment of my acne scars and hyperpigmentation. The person over the phone told me that I should be seen by a medical dermatologist at Scripps first, then I can be referred for laser treatment. This is important later: He specified that I should see someone at Scripps.

I found it strange, since most cosmetic offices don't require this. I asked why, and the agent told me that it's to "see if they can cover some of these treatments through insurance." I told them that I had recently seen a medical dermatologist outside of Scripps and asked if they can send the referral. The agent hesitated and said yes.

I then probed further and asked what types of procedures are typically covered by insurance. He said that acne scars are typically not covered, which has been my experience. If that's the case, why are you pushing me to see a Scripps medical dermatologist, when it wouldn't be covered under insurance anyway? When I asked these questions, he said that it's because medical dermatologists would be able to "treat acne" that a cosmetic office may not be able to.

While this is fair, I made it very clear FROM THE BEGINNING that I wanted to treat my acne SCARS and hyperpigmentation. I never said that I have active acne, because I no longer do! Had he asked me this before pushing me to see their dermatologists, I would have been able to tell him this.

Perhaps this wasn't intentional, but my impression is that they're trying to drum up business and billing for their medical dermatology side. While I believe many can benefit from seeing a medical dermatologist, an extra visit for me is not necessary since I've been under the care of an excellent medical dermatologist for a long time, and my last visit was in May of this past year (I had also told him this).

If I'm going to be paying out of pocket prices anyway, I would rather go outside of Scripps.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Hatch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIB5QI4tCBmZbBYRBhhuWNx09E6OcB_UiDmM5o3fmAtEu4zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently had photodynamic therapy on my face for 2 pre-cancer spots. [{"Name":"Carmen Hagen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhEfHwRiVNzv-BFcSAUZ-IyAHik8_BDGEl4avJdLB_7qdOvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve waited a long time to write a review about Dr Smoot.  I had the same experience as one other reviewer. Dr Smoot did a breast revision plus breast lift. He took me from a 345 implant to a 225 which was a HUGE difference. Granted, I did want a reduction in order to look a bit more natural but not as small as he took me. Initially the results were satisfactory, but within 3 years, my breasts sagged and returned to the shape they were prior to the surgery. The implants are up high and very unnatural looking. I never go without a bra and am very lean and fit so that did not influence any sagging. Now I am very self-conscious and embarrassed about how unnatural and unattractive my breasts look. If I were 5 years younger, I would definitely have my breasts redone. So, my advice is to communicate VERY clearly what you expect.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laurie Peterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGWqbogOwVooBqs13k8MoX3EYhILaSkhDXkHbBGD-hP-lilvnMKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of Dr Smoot performing my surgery 17 years ago. And once again "he put me back together again" 3 months ago, after I experienced a rupture from a mammogram.  Round 2 was just as easy and his staff was outstanding.

The entire team is professional, friendly, and efficient, making the whole experience smooth and pleasant. I truly appreciate the ethical approach that Dr. Smoot takes in his practice. Other docs I had consulted with made things seem awkwardly urgent and wanted to do some over the top procedures including "needing drains". Dr Smoot's experience did not lead him to believe any of that was necessary. I had a very easy and successful recovery.

I highly recommend Dr. Smoot and his staff to anyone seeking a doctor who is not only talented but also truly cares about their patients. (I could seriously hang out with anyone there because they are friendly and fun🤣) Thank you for the exceptional care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Morales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZ9Sv4qnbrmap3m7CsMFXM2-ENjSRDU05xHn9sOCk1gAZGMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Smoot is amazing!! I got a breast augmentation and he offered his professional opinions which helped me decide on what size and type of implant I was going to choose. I never felt pressured by his recommendations which I love. He really listened to what I wanted and gave me different options. His whole team was very supportive and communicative. I’m very happy with my results and would highly recommend Dr. Smoot to anyone who wants a naturally fuller look.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crystal Kieley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0ah2yDnFaub_rXtRAtFm5QXCR3nEdfDDRR7pmxxPryiseuFZZIg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Smoot is wonderful. He did a terrific job with my Mommy Makeover. The procedure went great with no complications. I felt safe and never concerned from the moment I met him. He makes you feel comfortable and takes great care of you pre and post op. He does a great job with your body if you want the more natural approach. He is extremely skilled as a plastic surgeon. I would definitely see him again if needed and would highly recommend him to my family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olivia Liong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlt5YkczSNKIhS5vT_fR0nxIG2fxy8NbFYXJ0Ec1xvOJHDY0nL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Smoot and his staff was phenomenal. I was very comfortable with the process of my consultation. Dr Smoot recommended to do 405 cc silicone gel. I did not want to look natural (based on my preference).  Dr. Smoot said something that sticked out to me. He said "When people see you, I want them to say  'wow she looks beautiful", not 'Who is your plastic surgeon?'. Dr. Smoot and his staff main goal is to make their patients happy and confident with the outcome.  Originally,  I wanted to go bigger, but I am very glad I went with 405 cc. It fits my small frame perfectly.  Dr. Smoot and his staff was very punctual with time and went above and beyond my expectations. I went to get a breast augmentation Feb 2019.  Dr. Smoot and Sarah (nurse) constantly checked up on me the day of and after my surgery. Of course there are weekly, monthly, half a year and a year post opp. Sarah was always there to answer all of my questions and her answers were fully detailed.  Sarah is honestly the best. She is so attentive  to my needs and wants. I am so glad that she guided me throughout my  process.

Anyways, the day after my surgery, I had a post opp. My left breast had a hematoma. Dr. Smoot and his staff took care of me as soon as possible. I  went into surgery the same day and I felt so relieved that Dr. Smoot took care of the hematoma.  He called me with his personal phone to make sure I was okay. Clearly, Dr. Smoot cares about his patients.

Update in April 2019: My breast looks so stunning. It is proportionate to my body and I am so happy. I love how my breast turned out! I get plenty of compliments from my friends and family.

No doubt 5/5 stars , I am extremely happy with the service I had there. I recommend Dr. Smoot and Sarah. Because of them, I feel more like myself and have the confidence that I've always wanted.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D Mac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIU3qLqYQkSuwAXq_UtRs-O-OxiPjHNlc8au6iwH6rTjCpqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a breast lift with implants done approximately 3 years ago with Dr Smoot. I had heard amazing things about him. I had my first breast lift about 12+ years ago (different Dr)  and it was time to have them lifted again. After the surgery with Dr Smoot they  looked very nice but now,(not even 3 years) they look pretty much like they did prior to having them redone. I’m very disappointed. I paid a substantial amount of money and feel that the results should have lasted much longer than a couple of years.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allison Frame","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOW74DMVbV0dmT9i5chxfEo4gFBNKVPx3USNqjSzWLCau9ufN9SA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so happy to have chosen Dr. Smooth for my eyelid surgery.  Not only am I super happy with the results, but I always felt comfortable and trusted him completely.  Dr. Smoot, as well as his staff, were so nice and welcoming and very informative.  It was a very pleasant experience and I would do it again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lici Beas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPYz-uAc48SZs2rnLNUh3tpFtDE1_s_cCJslFFnPUE1VwE8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such an amazing experience with Dr Smoot and his fabulous team! The end result was better than I ever could have imagined. My breast’s look beautiful and I have never felt better!! 100 stars","Images":null,"When":""}]

El Dr. José Mayoral domina perfectamente su área.
Se nota que es muy estudioso y siempre explica todo de manera clara
para que uno entienda exactamente qué está pasando.
Además cuentan con equipo de última generación.
Tienen escáner 3D para hacer las impresiones, así que ya no usan esa
plastilina incómoda y con sabor raro.
Todo ahora es digital y mucho más preciso.
También tienen otro escáner completo de la dentadura y después el doctor
te muestra tu boca en 3D en la computadora para explicarte el diagnóstico
y sus recomendaciones.
Esto hace el proceso muy eficiente y no queda ninguna duda para el paciente promedio como yo.

Aceptan mi aseguranza sin problema y otras muchas.
Andrea siempre te recibe con una gran sonrisa y está al
pendiente de tu caso.
Se nota su atencion al detalle, profesionalismo y la calidez con la que trabaja.
La Dra. Natalia es muy amable, domina su materia, es rápida y eficiente,
y brinda una trato y experiencia excelente.

Cuando he necesitado garantía siempre la atienden rápido, de manera
eficiente y con una sonrisa.
Las cotizaciones siempre las entregan a tiempo, igual que los
comprobantes fiscales.
No te hacen batallar para nada.

La verdad están al nivel, o incluso mejor, que una clínica dental en
Estados Unidos.
Desde que llegué sentí ese mismo trato humano y cálido de las clínicas
famosas de San Diego, donde la experiencia médica o dental se vuelve algo
mucho más llevadero gracias al personal y los proveedores de salud que,
además de ser buenos, son amables.

He pasado por distintas clínicas y en varias tuve experiencias muy malas:
endodoncias dolorosas, mala anestesia y otros errores que prefiero no
detallar.
También me tocaron proveedores sangrones en clínicas reconocidas.
Todo eso cambió cuando llegué a Mayo Dental Clinic.
Los encontré porque su presupuesto fue más económico que el de la
clínica previa, pero nunca imaginé que serían la mejor de todas las que
he visitado.
También saben manejar muy bien mi nerviosismo, que viene de experiencias

Cosas que antes no te preocupaban, ahora sí las ves diferente. No es por vanidad, es más por sentirte bien contigo mismo, por salud y por autoestima. Y la verdad, llegó un momento en que decidí hacer algo por mí.

Después de pensarlo bien, acudí con el Dr. Ángel Valenzuela aquí en Mexicali, y fue una de las mejores decisiones que he tomado.

Desde la primera consulta me dio mucha confianza. Me escuchó con calma, sin juzgar, sin prisas. Le expliqué qué era lo que me preocupaba y qué quería mejorar, y él me habló claro, con honestidad, sin prometer cosas irreales. Me explicó todo paso a paso, qué se podía hacer, cómo sería el proceso y qué resultados podía esperar.

Eso para mí fue clave: sentir que estaba en manos de alguien profesional y responsable.

Durante todo el proceso me sentí acompañado. Siempre atento, resolviendo dudas, dándome tranquilidad. Nunca me sentí como “un paciente más”, al contrario, sentí trato humano y respeto.

El procedimiento salió muy bien, la recuperación fue mejor de lo que esperaba y, poco a poco, fui viendo los resultados. No solo fue un cambio físico, también fue emocional. Me sentí más seguro, más contento conmigo mismo, con más ánimo.

La verdad, me devolvió mucha confianza.

Hoy puedo decir que estoy muy agradecido con el doctor. Hizo un excelente trabajo y, sobre todo, me trató con seriedad, respeto y profesionalismo.

Por eso, si alguno de ustedes está pensando en hacerse una corrección, mejorar algo de su cuerpo o simplemente quiere sentirse mejor consigo mismo, de corazón les recomiendo al Dr. Ángel Valenzuela. Yo tuve una muy buena experiencia y volvería con él sin pensarlo.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Cindy Baugh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEIGaoDcs4yTXGLmrOnLs_0H8NVQLkfgpMGPUMprJ55A_u3uA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had two procedures with Dr. Luque now, and I can't even highly enough express my gratitude for the wonderful experiences and outcomes each time. Dr. Luque is kind, thoughtful, and highly skilled. He listens and genuinely tries to accomplish the goals you have for your body. He's also very honest and realistic in that he will talk you through what is possible and what is not, as well as, the options you have. And most of all, he's safe!! While he goes to great lengths to help you meet your goals, he doesn't do so at the expense of your safety. If it's not safe, he'll tell you so and won't put you at risk. Then he'll tell you what you can safely do and takes the time to explain why. Despite the precautions which I'm happy he takes, his results have been phenomenal. I never dreamed I could ever be comfortable in my own body, and he's made that happen which has drastically improved my quality of life. Patients value its efficiency, cleanliness, and family-centered medical services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nobody Knows It But Me","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDGw9JlO8BCQaju2RDYXNuyVy9BBdywe9eBX6W7iDYPb7hwgc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Save yourself the disappointment and future surgeries and don't come here. Dr. Marco Sariñana did a horrible job on my breast lift and other surgeries. So much so that I will have to have additional surgeries to fix what he destroyed. Yes, DESTROYED!! If Dr. Sariñana was in the US, I would be suing him for malpractice. I was offered corrective surgery to fix Dr. Sariñana mistakes at a cost of an additional 1700.00 US. More money is a reoccurring theme with this hospital.
There were so many things that went wrong. Carlo didn't give me the correct date for my surgeries. He scheduled them the day I flew in. So after a long day of travel, driving to the hospital in a hot van (no AC) in temperature of 110°+, I arrive at the hospital at 2p dehydrated and told I am going into surgery at 8p. The first thing I had to do was pay for the surgeries. I am glad I saved all my emails from Carlo because Maritza tried to charge me more. Even when I showed her the email, she said it was an old quote. However, she wanted my money more than she wanted to have me cancel right there, so the quote was honored for the time being. I was so dehydrated that the nurse had to poke me 3 times before she could keep a vein from collapsing. I was never given the opportunity to speak with the doctor about what I wanted done or my expectations. So, when you see “presentation of surgical plan" in your paperwork, that’s not going to happen. When I did see the doctor, he had me stand naked in front of a room full of people while he drew marks on me. After a few minutes, I was guided to a table to lay down. Next thing I remember, I am waking up. The two days in the hospital were fine. Mexican nurses don’t cater to you but neither do US nurses. All of the nurses were great and helpful. Language was never a problem because most of the staff spoke some English and Google Translate helped with the rest. The hospital is clean and functional, but not over the top like the US. I can reason that is one way they keep their cost down.
After I was discharged from the hospital and going to the hotel, Maritza tells me that I might owe more money because of the mistake Carlo made the quote. After I told Maritza that I had a strict budget for everything and no more money to give, the problem with the money was dropped. I wasn’t given any instructions on how to care for myself after I was discharged. So basically, I was on my own. However, I did get my receipts for the money I paid the day before I left Mexico (13 days later), but was never given any medical records.
The only good experience I had was with the private nurses that I hired to care for me. I came alone and was sure I would need help. I am glad I made that decision. They were amazing!!
My best advise, find someone else. There are great doctors in Mexico, however this hospital don’t have them.
Edit: I spoke with Maritza several times and told her how unhappy I was. That's why I was looking at corrective surgery before I left. The additional cost shouldn't have been my responsibility to pay. But, I was alone and didn't have anyone to advocate for me with people who get defensive and loud. Again, it should be telling that the response from the hospital doesn't refute anything in my review because everything is true.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2-EcMEyOlxFrTFrRgvpLivUjII5yfznmjyqVOJMtD5JgZGru3yFoqgn0LQ_8km-_vo4WleOmRQckYYa5pBr-7hAX3qsvCxlzBk6cuq78RqNyznU4Wro9XNKMH7lLXkiLH8YJNG=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1wiOx02Q9i2D3k9VDMe_WD3pAXMSrZAzXimMhw9N-Ae4Z-F-98M9UgS1Or9opdA-xEWYh7eEJ9L_8bDe7XCsz2T1Rbiml6D5rZbeKjzYNsRlGL8M5kwaEeinfwhcKoq43UKl8B=k-no"],"When":"2021-11-21"},{"Name":"Angel Escalante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSW07BjeVIKjon1slHCCiyEWqMDvFDAV4dgJBLyeaRc_FDhZKZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their service was excellent and they were very attentive. I live far away so his easy access to zoom visits after care and ability to pay with card.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Avery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQDeQiQ_-ydCdk2sUihK25pJDGfEHsWd_2F7pLloIkLDQr3o4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The Best Decision I’ve Ever Made — Thank You, Dr. Amaya
Patient Review:
My mommy makeover with Dr. Amaya has truly been the best self‑care decision of my life. The results exceeded every expectation — my shape looks natural, my clothes fit better, and my confidence is higher than it has ever been. I feel amazing.

I spent years researching surgeons in both California and Mexico and followed Dr. Amaya for over two years. No matter where I looked, he consistently stood out as the top surgeon. When I finally scheduled my consultation, I knew immediately I was in the right hands. His professionalism, talent, and calm confidence made the entire process feel right from the start. My only regret is not doing this sooner.

Partner Review:
As her boyfriend, my role was simple: support her and make sure she was cared for before, during, and after surgery. If you have any hesitation about traveling to Mexico, don’t. The process is safe, organized, and easy. We had only been to Mexicali once before this, but we made six follow‑up visits after surgery, and every experience was smooth.

The hospital is first‑class, and the after‑care facility recommended by Dr. Amaya was exceptional. She stayed three nights and four days, and the care team was attentive, professional, and compassionate.

My biggest advice: trust the doctor. He knows exactly what he’s doing and understands the emotional and physical ups and downs of the healing process. This is an intense journey, but with the right surgeon, it becomes manageable and reassuring.

Watching her transform and regain her confidence has been incredible. We wouldn’t want to go through this with anyone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Itzell Pullins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEmE8t1XAjH-1FEvH-udz-ALqeJvfsHATYlpvL19d1BGuPBJIT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am satisfied with the tissue replacement made by the doctor. The exceptional client service and expertise provided by the staff are truly commendable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mya B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZKOwfjCH9duDWsW7egpFRhvyqgbq_7Dbk1r3mSydlPzaK0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Honest review
Nov 2024 I came across this office during a different Dr visit. Their ad promoted Morpheous 8. I am 50 yrs old, due to aging and weight loss I developed sagging jowls and neck laxity. I asked for a consultation and it was provided the same day by the dermatologist (Dr). I was discouraged from getting a neck lift and told Morpheous 8 would tighten the areas. (Sales pitch) The price was just below the going rate in San Diego. My package incl 3 morpheous sessions, 1 Restalayne, Botox and Lumecca ($$$$). I made the mistake of not incorporating the time and distance which would have covered the cost in San Diego. So take that into consideration if pricing is your factor. I was unpleasantly surprised that Morpheous 8 was not performed by the Dr. Instead one of her assistants performed the first 2 sessions. The Restalyne around my jawline was injected incorrectly. I bled alot, my face was bruised and lumpy for almost 4 months. The Retalayne sat under my jaw line which only made the neck look saggier from one side. That was injected by the Dr. When the entire package was completed the Dr suggested I needed a few more treatments. She also asked me if I had gained weight because I looked heavier and that she also offered weight loss treatments. It has been a year and the scars on my cheeks worsened, they became more prominent. My jowls did not improve and my neck didnt show much difference. One month ago I had a deep plane facelift which completely corrected my issues. If I had to this all over again, I would not spend the money on temporary fixes. Facial treatments and injections are temporary. They are costly and requires maintenance. If you have the money, go for it. But for the money I spent at this office which was significant, I should’ve applied it towards my surgery (40%) see copy of receipt. This is my second review. The first review I was pretty much forced to write while they hovered over me, watching me write it. I didnt think it was fair to do so on my second visit without seeing any results. I deleted my first review and these are my final thoughts, one yr after my first visit. If youre in SD area, look up these treatment on Groupon, you will find that pricing is even cheaper and closer to home. I am a former client of Adriana Romo. This review is factual.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0fqXHUKW31pTj8jPmiX4ndXXb7Gt8gWP_trZg2zEnDTYBc-KYgG0MbU8x1xO1KjLhXSyC4FBfCOuez0KQqkIoHOZdnnL6Rwuc1m11b9jvT3Opd1nAtWliqpI6Wpepv7vPYGJJV28ucBB1d=k-no"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Iliana Agundez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAR8HfoY9u453dQOmTYjyAgEm0Hce6143pjocBegBwz4gvtg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough great things about this office. I am 73, had a long life with gum disease and a number of dentists and I recommend Dr. Fernando as The Best Dentist Ever.    Ever!
I have been his patient for about three years now and am  so thankful to have found him on recommendation from one of his patients.
While in his chair he has built me a 3 tooth bridge, several regular crowns, 4 E-Max crowns, numerous fillings and just installed a new surface on my upper middle teeth.  All his work on me is beautiful and a perfect fit.  I trust Dr. Medina.

She ended up putting a mask on me and leaving the room for a solid 20 minutes of my hour service. I then went and had Botox with a different practitioner. She was wonderful, but unfortunately, the placement of the Botox made my brows lower, and the middle of my forehead, maybe it was missed? It was frozen around the perimeter of my forehead and brows were now drooping but nothing else leaving very odd lines in the middle of my forehead. I had to have it touched up back in the states. [{"Name":"popo x.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8-I_aQa3cekcJzFROpxX7JY_-E6ZBsX_NI-g7veu_92fWmyVwMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a late review. I have been busy over a month since my visit, and even so, the recovery has gone well! I got a full mouth rehab here, about 90% done so far and highly recommend!

I found Ivan’s place because I was purposely looking for a smaller clinic where the service would feel more consistent, and I’m pretty sure I made the right choice. The clinic is run by a super responsible couple. Ivan is really passionate about his work, and his wife Britta is so considerate and patient. I appreciate that they picked me up at the border and drop me off at my place almost every day during my trip. The wife even took care of my tantrum baby for a while when my husband was busy contacting bank(you may need to notice the bank for a transaction). All the staff are nice and professional. Prices are amazing, and they treat you like an actual patient who needs the right treatment, not like a walking ATM (you know what I mean).

Ivan did a great job on my crowns and implant. The implant surgery went smoothly, and I barely had any pain. And the other dentist they work with, the one who handled most of my general dental work is also amazing!

I wouldn’t call it a full 10/10 yet since I still need to go back in a few months to finish the implant and check my bite. My trip was around 3–4 hours per day for three days straight, plus a small check-up on another day. But honestly, if you’re in the U.S. and need budget-friendly, efficient, professional dental work, especially for big issues It’s absolutely worth the trip.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Landon Beard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcTJyDn4tJoW0C9rZdR9GUOm0y-XlLqW90KX7tzOnwSEHmAw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Where do I even start? I guess before anything else this was a life changing experience and I couldn’t be happier so far. I had bad teeth genetics and it was always painful going to the dentist. I developed a fear of dentists and everything that went with the experience, the sounds, sights and smells would make my stomach turn. Years down the road lead to me to this last week. Dental care in the US is expensive and most insurance will not cover implants as they call them cosmetic. I am 47 and wasn’t sure dentures was were I wanted to be yet. I started to research implants and stumbled across Los Algodones . This is where the overwhelming information and choices comes in. There are so many dental offices and options to sort through reviews, prices, virtual visits, etc. all while being so far away. It is a big commitment to travel out of country for this kind of work. I had narrowed it down to a handful of clinics and centered my research around these clinics. After multiple virtual visits and phone calls Ivan Implant and Cosmetic Dental just seemed to stand out not only for good reviews, but just the way they took the extra time to explain in detail about the procedure. It was more informative of the process and what to expect than it was a sales pitch. I 100% made the right decision. We were picked up from our hotel in Yuma on day 1 by the driver named Edgar, cool young dude that answered all of our first timer border crossing questions. Crossing over each way was a simple process. Once in Algodones I was unsure how safe I would feel. Edgar walked us to our CT scan and bloodwork and showed us a nice restaurant for lunch. I never once felt unsafe and or uncomfortable and my wife even went out shopping on her own while I was in appointments and felt completely comfortable. The clinic always looked and smelled really clean.  There are quite a few people working here and everyone was very professional, friendly and polite. Dr Ivan was amazing throughout the entire process as well as his staff. I can’t recommend them high enough to anyone looking for dental work. If you decide to go the Los Algodones route you owe it to yourself to at least get a consultation with Dr Ivan. Here is a before and after. Anybody having questions about the experience with Dr Ivan and his team feel free to message me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mitsuru Sassa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCsWw4zU95d8p97h7X8SckiwS_xjrOY-684PbS8Dnk6tIrbw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have completed my All-on-4 procedure.
Dr. Ivan is highly experienced, holds numerous professional certifications, and was very trustworthy.
In my case, he remade the prototype six times until I was satisfied, at no additional cost.
I can now use them with the sensation of natural teeth.
I am truly grateful.
Thank you very much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ayoub","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjvFdoavIPEKeYr9Ftw84f2lPwxANVljvPK_KID5RuHXPh2IU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m from North Carolina and recently had my dental implant done at this Clinic in Los Algodones. I’m very satisfied with the procedure. The clinic is clean, professional, and all the staff are young and energetic. Brianda and the doctor communicate very well. They even provide airport pick-up and drop-off, and a host during the treatment. I’m currently in the first stage and will return in 6 months for the crown.☺️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francois Hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCAXCrQwEWtYLB_Xm3kGZfExD2rU1A80O_-ua21LzjKx1ft4vjmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the very begining of the process I knew I was in great hands, but let me backup the timeline first.

Years back I had an event which had knocked out my front teeth. I ended up throwing thousands of dollars at different u.s. dentists and each repair seemed to be worse than to one prior, lasting 2 to 6 months each.  I tried to over come the lack of teeth with a more infectious personality; but being in sales I rarely overcame this first impression, and my production fell until struck by homelessness. Years later, I contacted my parents and they hired Ivan.

Arriving there I was amazed at how much he loved the technical side of the industry and his perfectionism. My teeth are amaizing and stronger than the ones God gave me.  He helped me get my life back, and If I ever am again bound by the ropes of homelessness, I would just bite through them and save myself.  Thanks Ivan, you truly are the best.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ENOCK WATSON","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv5cm78S1POPTDl22AbLDWk68Ow2uoJ315Q6OKA8DNaeaeuHcc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is for the people who are having second thoughts. My experience with Dr. Ivan office from beginning to end was excellent him in the staff were so professional and very attentive. They need us feel like we were family. The other part is we got a chance to walk around the little town and bargain shop so if you’re unsure that you wanna go and experience a one in a lifetime experience erase that thought and go you will enjoy

PS I Love My Smile…..","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2mv_mhOogGtopy5WkXw199uU04t8p485ezMqKvhNNs3YNjLt4JLbOFk5sXKVqFfjEYqTvGYHbR0kp6SVUOohIMHrLG8JXCStZqL67EciWVMYxqFM7C8XehGncXdDlq8Y9U5axUY1XtlRM=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn19QQmugN1mPq77TXApctXBOmofXW0Ijs7s5eh-GgYG2bSHPFfjfCPkQbG-dN2fsz30ZRIvvwKhlLCPbhqYoc5cDuwuCtMM0iyW6Kyuczr_lU-Z5V_273MXAYQJLbJa8Xvfe3OekRarJGs=k-no"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Bonnie Isenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtzCe4nCFz_crI-NVqvLOBLbLvLKXjsBPzYMtVz2z0WqH2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I went to Dr Ivan for a 4 on 12 upper and lower implant procedure. After explaining in detail what to expect with the 3 day plan and answering our questions and concerns, he got started. I was so impressed with the care and concern that Dr Ivan and Brianna showed us both, helping us to acquire all that we would need to make this a successful venture. And it was a great success! [{"Name":"JetSet Jas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhA8aTE3EFIDEiAQWhxxrRZQkB6dykuWwjTpKIv_8xXoxsm8EOFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a very positive experience at Dental del Rio. They arranged pickup right after I crossed the border, which made the process seamless and stress-free. The office itself was clean, organized, and the staff was welcoming from the moment I walked in.

The specialist who performed my root canal did not speak much English, but the gentleman who completed my initial exam did and thoroughly explained everything. He provided a detailed price breakdown and clearly outlined what needed immediate attention versus what could safely wait. I appreciated that transparency — no pressure, just facts.

There was a short wait when I first arrived, which was expected. After my initial treatment, I waited a little over an hour before the next step. It wasn’t unreasonable, but my anesthesia began to wear off, which caused some discomfort. That said, the overall care and professionalism outweighed that inconvenience.

Based on my experience, I would recommend Dental del Rio to anyone considering treatment in Los Algodones","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0LkbIjpnbSj17EW6rhrA8-KNoRf9zskpj07cLoknTjUycFlRwv0c2uArQbY-RRaR0_jg1oR8pZtUiWTtBp-e1DgHK32h4agyLucKZpOPu_zptpX9IktwLanAsL_YoEjZSWh5x30oAQdZDt=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2qPUqxihfaSH6l-MjaTj23c_ZAKvzasKoLMf5ZEcfWePsjw-jxtN9M10URO8-2F6QWM_09CnoQJ5dXzTytCE83VE5th0KxGCAYahcq4_XY65H-TnRQ__KIoCZQ2l0fD6eJXhMwkUvPi5w=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0zZeTJ3nw1D28ISE236aBbRIZgjL1VQ3Tm1NAk_X4w0s8tSETvSvgqBCSrwv_cX0Sg_P58PkMJwIiPofHiqCJ9OncQM-Ptc9GNHujAyrhT8Lyqz7llzCqCPi6bPCxzU6j5XUQ-69xkt2T7=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2BAA4xaCKk4GeTJkbkoNwS0jQ45F0vvC69PGzK5oPris8UK6-9kS-_gOUxoUkXda1akWFROabTVLKNsuoNE-t3aG8LtpYMQIOQxRW2GGQFidKpCJcFCG7dM_JGE-iOVvaZVcecpZRvQTw=k-no"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Marisol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq64_fGZBkqSTauNLwQHpX4peD5byCcarzMgIIwhDO647uvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely professional. Details below.

If you’re one the fence about going to Mexico to get your teeth fixed, don’t be. I studied and researched all the best places and Dental Del Rio has blown all of my expectations out of the water.

Everyone here is an incredible professional with tons of experience and are some of the most kind people I have ever met in my 30 years of life. The facilities are clean, the dentist are fast and they do some of the best dental work I’ve ever had done.

For context I love sugar and hate brushing my teeth ever since I was a little boy. Before I discovered Los Algodones and Dental Del Rio, I’ve probably put 3 of my dentists kids through college.

Before I made the decision to come here, I was seen at an Aspen Dental in America and they quoted me $8100 from a dentist fresh out of dental school for 5 appointments over the course of a month+. This was my coat AFTER APPLYING ONE OF THE BETTER DENTAL PLANS…

I came into Dental Del Rio and I was quoted less than $2000 for the work I needed done, which was 2 root canals, 6 cavities, and 3 crowns, and everything would be completed within 3 days. Incredible service, prices, and a team with a combined 100+ years of experience. I recently had the pleasure of receiving dental treatment from Dr. Diego Lopez at Losan Dental, and I am beyond impressed with the exceptional care and expertise he provided. Dr. Diego completed all my prosthetic work over my implants with remarkable precision and attention to detail.
For my lower jaw, Dr. Diego Lopez created a titanium and zirconia hybrid prosthesis over the six existing implants. He also meticulously handled the prosthetic work on both my upper and lower jaws, ensuring every measurement was taken accurately for a perfect fit. The upper prosthesis involved an all-on-six metal zirconia hybrid, while the lower prosthesis featured titanium zirconia screws retained hybrid. Dr. Diego utilized the latest technology and materials available, which greatly contributed to the success of my procedures.
Throughout the entire process, Dr. Diego Lopez was incredibly patient and informative, explaining each step and addressing all my questions and concerns. His expertise as a prosthodontist and implantologist was evident, and his commitment to excellence was reflected in his meticulous attention to every detail, ensuring my comfort and satisfaction.
The facilities at Losan Dental are brand new and state-of-the-art, providing a comfortable and modern environment for patients. The clinic's convenient location near the border was a plus.
The Losan Dental office was less than a 2-minute walk from the best hotel in Algodones.  Additionally, Losan Dental offered a shuttle service from the Yuma, AZ airport for added convenience. The Losan Dental staff was outstanding, providing top notch support, timely answers to my questions, plus communicating key appointment and accommodation information. Please thank Yulissa and Diana all of their help and for being WONDERFUL!!!
During my visit, Doctor Diego Lopez gave me a tour some exciting enhancements to the Losan Dental site.  New guest room/hotel accommodations plus a new restaurant is currently being constructed and will soon be available for Losan Dental patients.  The guest rooms look great, and you will want to reserve one of these rooms!   The view from the rooms and the restaurant is amazing.  Staying there will definitely enhance the overall patient experience.  I will certainly want to stay there for my future visits.
Dr. Diego's patient care and professionalism truly stand out. He is dedicated to making every patient feel comfortable and well-informed throughout their treatment. His knowledge and skills as a specialized dentist are evident in the outstanding results I received.
I highly recommend Dr. Diego and Losan Dental for anyone seeking top-notch dental care. Thank you, Dr. Diego, for transforming my smile and providing such an exceptional experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lee Montoya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlT2NJdJXoKN4zMl7xM3lvbdapEWUnhPSCupaKTZNYp1C0oQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For all who value character traits of professionalism and compassion in their dentist, I strongly recommend that you consider performing your due diligence on Dr. Lopez and his staff at Losan. In my case, Dr. Lopez had to first repair the damage done by another dentist before he could begin the process of providing me with full implants. The work was extensive but he kept me fully informed as his work progressed. Also, for those of you who fear a “visit to a dentist,” fear not, Dr. Lopes is extremely gentle. Good luck and I hope that this review will help you with your difficult search for the right dentist in Los Algodones.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anita Mohamed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-1mV4OCYzo3TWpC4KZxixUsn72qkKuXeMxemcW87_go402oHt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So I highly recommend Dr. Diego Lopez for any type of dental work you may need. I was very nervous & scared but Dr. Diego was extremely kind, understanding, gentle & very informative. He always explained everything he was going to do before doing it,always made sure I understood & constantly made sure I was never in any pain. I spent a week there for the 1st part of the procedure & everything went great & again Dr. Diego made sure i was all good before i ledt back to Michigan. I returned in Feb of 25 to finish up & left with a brand new smile & the confidence to go with. I will forever be great full to Dr. Diego for giving me my smile, confidence & honestly my life back. If anyone is considering doing this or has any hesitation I whole heartedly recommend going to this amazing Dr. You will not be disappointed at all!! [{"Name":"Nerissiawoolever woolever","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7KLiSbYalfnMhuT_wxzezmv52NpfVOLOUVitInunX-_Qlig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Im completely done with this place! 2 hrs over my appointment time. They want you to go see numerous people. Asking the same questions. I had already been here and they already had my x-rays from2 weeks prior.

You 1st see someone so they can ask you how long you have in Mexico? Go wait..... 2nd get more x-rays. Wait again...... Get called into a exam room. Wait more......... Get called into the payment office and wait again or in my situation and after being told my dentist is ready for me. Get told the shuttle is ready for me to take me to another location to see my dentist. I show up to wait again and guess what? It wasn't my dentist, I was told my dentist is on freaking vacation! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Klint Kendrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTMJze71fmyUKXXtyxnU9IUcwwHX2U7VyM7Gk7L41llKq7uA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had extensive dental work done at Smile Makers Group in Los Algodones, including three implants, two bridges, a crown, and a root canal. One of the implants required a bone graft and sinus lift, so this was not minor or routine work. From start to finish, the experience was exceptional.

From my very first visit, I had the full attention of both the dentist and the hygienist. I was never rushed, and every procedure was clearly explained in fluent English. I always knew what was happening, why it was being done, and what to expect next, which made a complex, multi-step process feel manageable.

For the most challenging part of the first visit, I opted to use their anesthesiologist, who quite literally knocked me out for the hardest part of the procedure. That made a huge difference in comfort and reinforced how seriously they take patient safety, pain management, and overall care.

The clinical work itself was excellent. The team was organized, precise, and clearly experienced with advanced dental procedures. They took real pride in their work, and that showed in both the process and the results.

All of this was done for about 25% of what the same treatment would have cost in the United States, without any sense that quality or attention was compromised. If anything, the care felt more personal and more attentive than what I’ve experienced elsewhere.

I would recommend Smile Makers Group without hesitation to anyone considering implants or major dental work in Los Algodones. I’m extremely pleased with both the experience and the outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kurt Reimer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIn_esfDqeRv9Y4s4Etq_Hwh15qInhlTISuCBSUa51vRsA3VA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience at Smile Makers Group was fantastic. I used my debit card to make payment the same day as my visit and could see the charge pending on my account. 2  days later I logged into my account only to see a second charge from the office for the same amount. I checked the details of the second charge and it states that Dr. Flores's office made the charge to my account the day after my visit. I immediately called the bank and disputed it. A few days later the bank sent me an email requesting additional info from me. I took that as Dr. Flores’ office is trying to contest my dispute claiming that the second charge is valid. I then emailed Dr. Flores’ office stating what has occurred with the double charge and that I’m disputing it but the bank is requesting additional information so I suspect that they’re claiming that it’s a valid charge. Also, I included in the message that I am going to leave a review and it would be good to resolve this matter before I leave a review. Dr. Flores always gives me the best advice and never tries to upsell or charge me for unnecessary treatments, even though he easily could. In fact, he often gives me a discount without me even asking. His integrity and honesty have earned my complete trust. Visiting his office almost feels like seeing a family member – he’s as caring and attentive as an uncle. Despite his busy schedule, Dr. Flores always finds time to fit in his patients, and I appreciate how much effort he puts into accommodating everyone.

A special mention to his assistant, Ms. Julissa, who is incredibly kind, friendly, and efficient. She makes the whole experience seamless and pleasant.

If you’re looking for a dermatologist who is not only skilled but truly cares about his patients, I highly recommend Dr. Roberto Flores.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wayne Sexton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-sNX1bhvMv12dAka12XzhZD9y5okvlql6fFDFz34PvWUPh5iD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had two visits within 6 weeks for removal of old age spots on the face and body. Wouldn't recommend based on this major malfeasance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Belfki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn4nWDhAg1AdD14J4nA8edbYN39T9mPbXI5lwQ_H0SWQmNDiN9Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"AMERICANS BEWARE. It sucks that I have to do this but I need to sound the alarm here to warn other people from coming here.

DR Jesus Danilo Gaspar Cuevas (Jesus going forward) destroyed my mouth. In fact my experience was so bad that I am genuinely questioning not only the reviews here but also his credentials.

Like most people, I drove down here so that I could get some dental work done for less money. I don't have dental insurance in the USA and I needed a big amount of work completed.

The beginning was great. The appointment was really fast, faster than any appointment in the USA, the staff was friendly, and accommodating. I was relieved after I left because I thought we were able to fix everything. Oh how I wish this was true. Unfortunately for me, the opposite happened.

I am attaching the full email chain you can review for the full lore. And all pictures, which I labeled to match below summary.

If you're thinking of coming here, please show my x-rays to any local dentist in your area so they can verify just how terrible the quality of work was so that you can hopefully reconsider.

The email attachment describes this in more detail but in summary:

July 2025, I arrived and paid for 3 crowns and 5 fillings over 1 weekend. Originally, they charged me for 6 but said later it was not needed; they said they would give me a "deep cleaning" to cover the cost of the filling.  Around $1500 total.

Soon after I began experiencing sensitivity to cold/hot/spicy foods on the left side of my mouth and general discomfort.

In September 2025 i had to have an emergency root canal on one of the teeth that had one of the newly installed crowns. The crown was installed improperly and got reinfected so bad, spreading to the nerve, that a root canal was my only option. $2000 dollars.

During this appointment, i also x-rayed the left side of my mouth and was informed that not only was this root canal needed (a) but also b) a crown was installed with bad margins and is already leaking so it's only a matter of time before i start experiencing discomfort and need to replace it + the way they installed it is they shaved parts off of my neighboring teeth to make it fin (jam it in basically) instead of properly fitting it onto my tooth. (Shaving down healthy teeth damages the enamel and may cause additional issues in the future.) and c) no deep cleaning was done, the images the dentist took show severe debris behind my teeth and in his words 'does not indicate a cleaning was done since you last came here for on in march'

December 2025
Back again because I am experiencing continued discomfort in my mouth.  This time, i x-rayed the right side of my mouth and what do you know? One of the fillings placed by Jesus in July has already shattered, and it's again, only a matter of time before I end up needing an emergency visit to fix it. $180.00

Refunds
The place was adamant that they don't issue refunds. I was adamant that I don't feel comfortable or safe coming back because it's clear that all the work completed was subpar to say the least, and is already failing. It's only been 6 months and it's already looking terrible for me. I am going to spend the next few years basically undoing and replacing all the piss poor work Jesus installed into my teeth and praying that the teeth he shaved to jam his crowns in don't fail in the meantime.

After a lengthy back-and-forth Jesus sent an apology and a refund for the crown I had to have the root canal on. The office refused to acknowledge anything else or send me a full refund. They kept stating I would have to come back to fix their mistakes. WHY WOULD I COME BACK. You could not pay me to come back.

Additionally, it took about 5 weeks to even get the partial refund they sent; after following up twice.

Edit: just went to post about my experience on their YouTube channel and couldn't because comments are already turned off. Go I followed each and every precaution, I took them seriously. No sunlight, using a headband, sleeping upright and no lifting which resulted in loss wages each time I had surgery (I work at the hospital) and for nothing. I became extremely upset after every surgery failure, resulting in a “I’m sorry let’s fix it” except it never got fixed and I chose not to go to the last appointment, the disappointment was just too much, I always had a smile, always upbeat and positive after every failure but the last time I just broke. While I do speak well of Dr. Brooksher and his staff and would recommend him for certain procedures, Otoplasty would not be one of them.
